name: Rep. Katie Porter
subject: Join me for a special event with NDTC!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| [You’re invited] will I see you there?
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PkaPVT4orKsDMO9qmkvyLb7cShRtJgGT-6Aa1hrWl8M)
Peter, Katie Porter here! I am excited to join the NDTC team as an honorary co-chair with my colleagues Reps. Lauren Underwood and Nikema Williams. So excited, in fact, that the first thing I asked Kelly when I agreed to be a co-chair was:_‘When do I get to do my own live training?’_ **And let me tell you, it didn’t take long to make that happen!** **[That’s right, I’ll be joining Kelly and Rep. Underwood next Tuesday, September 14 at noon ET for a special Q&A panel on running for office! Follow this link to RSVP for this event.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lXD87UM4eIX7H0ejV1QKgeakbwcTjkQboBE41dwJeec)** | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JTXtyplkrdAOqwZemV1gua6QVExPC0outx0PD2Jkfqc)
---
Peter, running for office isn’t easy. I know firsthand the difficulties of running for office, especially as a single working mom.
But with the help of NDTC’s free resources, and a few tips and tricks from folks like me who’ve been there before, you will be well on your way to winning your next race.
[**You won’t want to miss this! Click here now to reserve your spot for my special Q &A with Kelly and Rep. Underwood next Tuesday, September 14 at noon ET!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..F2PDrXgRzB3Eh9bjTsrtdCqgY0fE-apl6Mw3lwdI20c)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jdpbyd_c0IRQqzJ26hm3UkWXulltqWamaHPzrlprKN8)
---
Hope to see you there!
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Fw0iGS3qB9u9gawK5onwqcP3YWBDNJUzOAhsuYhbZnQ)
---
— Rep. Katie Porter
| This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjMxMDU4NDIwLCJuYmYiOjE2MzEwNTg0MjAsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJxazlvZHF2NzB2eWlsYzVsYnRpcCIsInVybCI6Ij9fX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kjIn0.xxndz2e9kg4M5psmjH2PaIJKYFx2H8OhcAOBpNoi3rM) | [Unsubscribe](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BeNwoNskbUJBExmesHziLAe9O9cSh-ViJNRV9RY-Vag)

clean_body: WI Gas Prices Survey Is it just us, lately, or are we paying way too much at the pump? Thanks to Joe Biden and the radical leftists in Congress, inflation is up... and gas prices are WAY up. We want to see how bad it's really gotten in your neck of the woods. Will you take our – how much have YOU had to pay to fill up lately? 2021 Gas Price Survey Here's the dirty truth about our gas prices in Joe Biden's America: they don't WANT cheap gas! Biden's anti-energy agenda has increased costs and regulations on American producers and pipelines, and the radical left wants to END fossil fuels all together. They don't WANT you using your trucks, your gas-combustion engines, your lawnmowers and leaf blowers. And they just might get away with making that change PERMANENT if we don't fight back! Could you take just a quick moment to answer our survey and help fight back against the radical left? -Team Roth Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Win 'King Walz' State Fair Sign
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=1)
---
Peter \-- How would you like to be the owner of the forbidden 'King Walz' sign from our State Fair booth?! **When the[State Fair told us to take down the sign](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_goes_back_up_on_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=2) because it was disrespectful to the Governor, we refused to be silenced. After all, it was Walz who infringed on our liberties by locking us in our homes, shutting down our businesses, forcing us to wear a mask and mandating vaccines. He ****deserves no respect!** After I informed the State Fair of our decision to keep the signs up, they stole them from our booth in the middle of the night. But we didn't back down. Our lawyer sent them a letter and we made new ones that went right back up. Now you can be the owner of one of those forbidden 'King Walz' signs. **Everyone who donates at least $25 to our field operations in the next 48 hours has a chance to be selected as the new owner of the 'King Walz' sign.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=3) Your donation doesn't only give you a chance to own the infamous 'King Walz' sign, but you are also supporting the one group in Minnesota that does not back down to the political class or radical leftists who want to destroy America! **We're growing everyday with more field operatives and volunteers. Your financial support keeps the engine running. It's what keeps the pressure on politicians who want to take away our freedoms through lockdowns and government mandates.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=4) And as you probably know, the battle for our freedoms are ramping up. Hospitals and businesses are threatening to FIRE workers who refuse to get the experimental vaccine. That's why I instructed our team to travel around the state. We need freedom fighters on the ground bringing heat to the political class, while standing up for your liberty. If we lose this battle to protect your right to choose what goes in your body, then I'm afraid we are on the course to lose this great country. Personal health freedom is one of the most fundamental freedoms that exists. But we don't have to lose this battle. Action 4 Liberty is organized and growing by thousands every week. Unfortunately, that will all stop if we don't get funded by supporters like you. [**So please pitch in $25 to help our field team grow. And you just might be the lucky one who becomes the owner of the 'King Walz' sign.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=5) **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_state_fair_king_walz_sign&n=8), software for leaders.

Peter, We hope you and your families had a restful Labor Day holiday! Here at Team Martin, we took some much needed time off to prepare for the long road ahead, and now we’re ready to get to work for a stronger, healthier Tennessee. But the thing is, we can only bring Tennessee the leadership it deserves by listening to its people — the issues they care about, what keeps them up at night, and how they’d like to see their voices reflected in Nashville. That’s why we’re taking this campaign on the road — starting _tomorrow_ , **Dr. Jason Martin will travel to all 95 counties in Tennessee in 95 days, so that he can hear directly from Tennesseeans in every corner of the state.** [_**Can you pitch in to help cover costs for Dr. Martin’s listening tour? For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseeans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories.
There’s no doubt that those failures have been made all the more obvious by the COVID-19 crisis, but it started long before then.
If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — we’ve got to bring power back to the people. That’s what this 95 County Tour is all about.
[_**Will you join us on our mission to elect a governor who will be a voice for ALL Tenneeseeans by contributing to support our 95 County listening tour?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35402026/304944504/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210908countiestour_TM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWE5YWQ5Mi05YzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTlPkm71imPyqPYwjH9ipVj8vTrtfWFrAo_VZAWg6l0=)

clean_body: Are you ready to get to work for a stronger, healthier Tennessee? | = Peter, We hope you and your families had a restful Labor Day holiday! Here at Team Martin, we took some much needed time off to prepare for the long road ahead, and now we’re ready to get to work for a stronger, healthier Tennessee. But the thing is, we can only bring Tennessee the leadership it deserves by listening to its people — the issues they care about, what keeps them up at night, and how they’d like to see their voices reflected in Nashville. That’s why we’re taking this campaign on the road — starting tomorrow , Dr. Jason Martin will travel to all 95 counties in Tennessee in 95 days, so that he can hear directly from Tennesseeans in every corner of the state. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseeans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories. There’s no doubt that those failures have been made all the more obvious by the COVID-19 crisis, but it started long before then. If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — we’ve got to bring power back to the people. That’s what this 95 County Tour is all about. = = = As Dr. Martin has said time and time again, this is our campaign. It’s not about personal fame or popularity — it’s a collective movement for the people of Tennessee to reclaim what is ours. Thanks for your support, Team Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A recent poll shows a tied race and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.

**_[Early voting starts in just 10 days. Can you donate and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35403204/304947158/-2023814932?refcode=20210908.1_TM_9AR&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWE2YTc3Yi1hMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZEckrqKlnQXj0j8jfegB-n9Fnk1rny8lppdcned2jI=)_**

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. _And_ media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’”

_And,_ with Roe V. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.

Look, early voting starts in just 10 days, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Do you approve of Biden’s gun control, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Joe Biden is coming for your guns and your freedom! Read more >>
Peter, In the history of our great nation, our Second Amendment rights have never been more in danger than they are right now. Even as he turns thousands of military rifles over to Taliban terrorists, Joe Biden wants to ban law-abiding Americans from giving their firearms to a friend or loved one without a government background check. And Biden and ultra-liberal Democrats are openly calling for an outright BAN on many of the most commonly owned firearms in America. I won’t stand for it, Peter. I firmly believe in our Constitutional right to keep and bear arms, and I’ll defend it until my dying breath. **But I want to know your opinion, Peter. Do you support Joe Biden and the Democrats’ radical gun control policies?** Take the poll to let me know what you think! Dear Friend,

It can and it will happen here.

Draconian abortion laws like the one passed in Texas will soon be on the table in Pennsylvania. Our lawmakers are actively working to pass cruel, deadly laws that take away our right to reproductive health care.

PA State Rep. Stephanie Borowicz is one of them.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090821 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090821]

If legislators like Rep. Borowicz win elections, we will end up in the same dangerous situation as Texas.

We don’t have the Supreme Court to protect us anymore -- they refused to block Texas’ abortion ban. We only have ourselves and our votes.

I’m furious and terrified. I know you are, as well. We’re working to prevent this from happening in our state, but we need your help TODAY.

Please donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090821] or volunteer [https://secure.everyaction.com/uzGCPSTbqE-PPaK8Nmgqjw2?contactdata=kE9OfI%2BrM7ajMLSLzgBGIpu1fbf3ssMI9nT4ElpN001PCGFYtoTz6%2B%2Fe2u%2BhlTN73y1czVctUnPno%2FwJ3q5C34chpGAjWMxRsC1u7IokplgoZFSj2smvy2f0FpsP8KOC3J%2FB0AXHy44dYIU3SOHtUg%3D%3D] to help us make sure voters are ready for upcoming elections. We cannot turn back the clock on women's rights in PA.

Thank you for fighting with us,

Jenna

\-- The radically partisan Supreme Court just allowed Texas Republicans to move forward with the most extreme abortion ban in the US on record, despite legal attempts to block it.

\-- This dangerous move will send SHOCKWAVES through Texas abortion clinics, penalize doctors for providing life-saving care, and throw access to critical reproductive care into CHAOS.

[**\-- Now, Republicans are plotting against _Roe v. Wade_ \-- scheming to bring devastation to women all over the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35416525/304983540/61647182?source=20210907_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyNTdkYi1iMzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7TF9_n-DlXfytVdUEfv9vS35RgvsEUtxa1ik6pWbBvU=&emci=91e77734-1d10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9fc257db-b310-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16320219)

I need an OVERWHELMING response -- 100,000 signatures before midnight -- to prove unwavering support for _Roe v. Wade_ , CONDEMN Texas Republicans’ attacks on our rights, and show women everywhere that we have their backs in the fight for reproductive rights. Will you sign right away? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35416526/304983541/61647182?source=20210907_em_pet_b1_pelosi_30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyNTdkYi1iMzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7TF9_n-DlXfytVdUEfv9vS35RgvsEUtxa1ik6pWbBvU=&emci=91e77734-1d10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9fc257db-b310-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16320219)

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. Derek, last week, a right-wing majority on the Supreme Court abandoned _Roe V. Wade_ by refusing to stop a radical Texas law that banned most abortions.

As you may have heard, the Texas law is one of the most extreme abortion bans ever passed in our country.

Unbelievably, the law lets any person from anywhere in the country sue any Texan who helps someone get access to an abortion.

It’s a disgusting law, and if the Supreme Court refuses to protect _Roe V. Wade_ and reproductive freedom, we can’t stay silent.

We believe that _Roe V. Wade_ is the law of the land and that no one has the right to tell someone else what they can or can’t do with their bodies.

name: Team Bass
subject: Politico released latest California recall numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
**" Newsom has strong support in latest California recall survey"**
---

A survey released this week found that 58 percent of likely voters say they'll REJECT the California recall. These are encouraging numbers, team, but we can't take our foot off the pedal just yet.

Fringe characters and right-wingers have put themselves on the ballot to defeat Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom. With cases of COVID-19 rising and our state facing the dangerous impacts of climate change, Californians can't afford to have these anti-science conspiracy theorists in the governor's seat.

Karen, along with Congresswoman Barbara Lee, is **against** the recall, and she's calling on Californians to vote NO on September 14.

**[Karen needs to know where you stand, friend. Will you let Karen know if you are FOR or AGAINST the recall election? | | Peter, We all know that Republican Madison Cawthorn is an enabler of Trump’s Big Lie. But Cawthorn just went even further, being caught on camera warning of potential violence between Americans over future elections: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35421894/305007946/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210908_FR_FightingBack_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Q5YjgwNi1jMjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zoYvucgLtaDQ7OLU9wzlBkjZu16ub-5kPQwUpZNNLg=) Cawthorn’s appalling comments on election fraud and January 6th are out of line -- even for him. **We cannot allow his dangerous rhetoric and fear mongering to rile up more extremists and lead to another insurrection.** [**Jasmine is running for Congress to bring integrity and empathetic leadership to Western North Carolina. name: Conor Lamb
subject: A right is a right, no matter what state you live in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35423132/305013177/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q3M2IzOC1jNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPP4bwDsZkrldmCjjZ_xHnTDY2TSh90unRsO2sOFfbQ=)

Friend,

Last week, Texas enacted the most restrictive anti-choice law in the country -- essentially outlawing abortion before most women know they're pregnant.

The Supreme Court had the opportunity to prevent this law from going into effect, and in a 5-4 decision, chose not to act. **They allowed one state to deny its citizens the right to choose that was granted by _Roe v. Wade._**

Let me be clear, Roe is the law of the land, and the Supreme Court must remember that their oaths, and our constitution, require them to apply rulings based on laws, not political ideology.

**[If you agree that the right to choose is a constitutional right no matter what state you live in, then add your name alongside mine to demand that we end these continued attacks on the right to choose in this country>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35423134/305013179/667783422?ms=em21_210908_txscotus&refcode=em21_210908_txscotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q3M2IzOC1jNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPP4bwDsZkrldmCjjZ_xHnTDY2TSh90unRsO2sOFfbQ=&emci=52f4a8fa-1110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcd73b38-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35423136/305013181/667783422?ms=em21_210908_txscotus&refcode=em21_210908_txscotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q3M2IzOC1jNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPP4bwDsZkrldmCjjZ_xHnTDY2TSh90unRsO2sOFfbQ=&emci=52f4a8fa-1110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcd73b38-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396) I've already co-sponsored Rep. Judy Chu's Women's Health Protection Act, which codifies Roe into federal law so that no state can deny women and pregnant persons their constitutional right to choose.

We will pass it in the House, and we need to elect a Senate that will do the same -- **because a right is a right no matter what state you live in. Period.**

**[If the Supreme Court won't fulfill their duty to uphold our laws, then Congress must act. It's time to put an end to these politically motivated attacks. Add your name to stand with me in supporting the constitutional right to choose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35423138/305013182/667783422?ms=em21_210908_txscotus&refcode=em21_210908_txscotus&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q3M2IzOC1jNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPP4bwDsZkrldmCjjZ_xHnTDY2TSh90unRsO2sOFfbQ=&emci=52f4a8fa-1110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcd73b38-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396)**

Peter,

Do you feel like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are IGNORING the border crisis?

Are you afraid that their failed leadership is putting our health and safety at risk?

**You aren’t alone. **

More drugs, cartel thugs, and violent migrants are flooding across our border than ever before. They are infiltrating communities across America, even here in Georgia!

name: NextGen America
subject: What you can do to protect the freedom to choose in Texas
body:
| | | Abortion is health care — and health care is a human right. Patients in Texas need your help now more than ever.
---
| [Make a donation](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35424601/305018331/1904438838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5NzA0YS1jODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL68wPVTQQTDBL0TWqJ3LGSdvCpCPwyuEGgMS6aESvY=&emci=6bf267e0-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3729704a-c810-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Last week, the most extreme abortion ban in the country took effect in Texas — and the Supreme Court allowed it. **
Texas Senate Bill 8 is a dangerous and disgraceful law that bans abortions as early as six weeks, before many people even know they’re pregnant. Now, most patients in Texas no longer have access to safe and legal abortions.
**More than ever, we need to fight for patients in Texas and ensure they still have access to the care they need. **
[Act now: Split your donation to support these ten abortion funds that are working tirelessly to fight for safe and accessible abortion care in Texas.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35424606/305018332/1904438838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5NzA0YS1jODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL68wPVTQQTDBL0TWqJ3LGSdvCpCPwyuEGgMS6aESvY=&emci=6bf267e0-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3729704a-c810-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
Texas SB 8 is deeply concerning for all of us who are fighting for the right to health care. Here’s what you need to know about Texas’s abortion ban:
* **Texas SB 8 bans all abortion starting at six weeks** — before many know they’re pregnant — **with no exceptions for rape or incest.**
* **Texas SB 8 disproportionately attacks communities of color and low-income communities** in Texas that already struggle to access the right to reproductive health care. This law creates another burden for those who can least afford it.
* **Texas SB 8 places a bounty of $10,000 on abortion providers** — meaning doctors, health centers, **and anyone else who helped someone access an abortion after six weeks.**

Texans are feeling furious and worried for the future — and so are we. But we’re fighting back.**Organizers on the ground are fighting day and night to protect patients in Texas, and we’re fighting with them. **
[Help protect patients in Texas access their right to abortion care by splitting your donation to these ten abortion funds. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35424607/305018338/1904438838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5NzA0YS1jODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL68wPVTQQTDBL0TWqJ3LGSdvCpCPwyuEGgMS6aESvY=&emci=6bf267e0-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3729704a-c810-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
Thank you,
NextGen America

268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/6bf267e0-c610-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/3729704a-c810-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI5NzA0YS1jODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL68wPVTQQTDBL0TWqJ3LGSdvCpCPwyuEGgMS6aESvY=&id=109799863)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: You deserve a full-time candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Kirsten has an important announcement regarding the race for AZ-02. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35425234/305020244/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU1NTU2NC1jYTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbBokRCWsXzmxzhH3yURaGZcEh8LT0ByUzd6oICSuu0=&emci=30f66da4-c010-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7be55564-ca10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,

Serving the people of Legislative District 10 for the past 5 years has been my absolute honor and privilege. I am proud to have served my community and fought for Southern Arizona interests -- to fully fund public education; to solve our urgent problems of water shortage, increasingly extreme weather, and devastating wildfires; to reform our criminal justice system; to protect Arizona families from unfair budget proposals; and to help small businesses navigate the challenges presented by COVID-19.
I look forward to continuing that fight in Congress and advocating for the issues that matter to everyday Southern Arizonans.
That is why, after much consideration, **I have decided to step down from the State Senate to fully commit my time, energy, and focus to my campaign to continue to serve the people of Southern Arizona in the US Congress.**
I know how much work it will take to win this district, and I’m ready to take on that challenge whole-heartedly.
Many pundits are forecasting a Republican takeover of Congress in 2022 and special interest groups are prepared to spend millions to buy this seat back. _We can't let that happen. _
I am ready to give my all to this race as your full-time candidate and I need to know you are with me.
[**Whether you can give $100, $50 or even $5, can I count on you to chip in ****and help us keep this seat, and possibly Congress itself, in Democratic hands?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35425235/305020245/558373307?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_090821_FullTimeCandidate_other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU1NTU2NC1jYTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbBokRCWsXzmxzhH3yURaGZcEh8LT0ByUzd6oICSuu0=)

name: Matt Mowers
subject: I’m a Pro-Trump conservative Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress
body:
I'm running for Congress.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDU1ODQwNjAS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MjA4MTg3OTYwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.)

Peter, Conservatives need to take back the House, and the only way we can get it done is if pro-Trump Republicans step up to the plate. This is conservative Republican Matt Mowers, and today I launched my candidacy in New Hampshire's 1st District. **President Trump needs more allies in Congress.** I proudly served in his administration, and I'm running for Congress to take back our country from the failed Biden/Pelosi agenda. This the MOST important race in the country and it will decide the House majority. clean_body: It’s really important, Peter. | Did you hear what Donald Trump, Jr. said, Peter? Tell us where you stand, Peter: with Republicans or Democrats? Republican Patriots all over America are standing with President Trump, supporting Marco Rubio, and reclaiming the Senate Majority -- and we need you to do the same. | | | | | | | | | | The Left has been targeting Florida fovever , Peter. They still haven’t gotten over President Bush’s win there in the 2000 Election (remember “hanging chads?”) \-- and now they want to defeat Marco Rubio just to embarrass and attack President Trump! If we let the Democrats win in Florida, it’ll change the Electoral Map forever and force us into a permanent minority in the Senate. | | | | Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. Terms and Conditions at [21011-info.com](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=r6rcTiCaq6j7Lcgrzw4K17041lLwyHYaLS1Xg9Z7-WE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=364927410721330876_p&n=19).
To contribute by mail, please send a check made payable to “North Carolina Republican Party” to:
North Carolina Republican Party, 1506 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27605, United States
**Contributions to North Carolina Republican Party are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes and may be used in connection with federal elections.**

clean_body: It’s our job to Save America. | Thanks for opening this email, Peter. We really need to check-in with you. With friends like that, it’s no surprise that he’s one of the frontrunners for the Democrat nomination for Senate in North Carolina. If he wins the nomination he’ll rake in millions in donations from liberals in California and New York, and do, say, and spend whatever it takes to seize North Carolina for the Left. We’re going to need the support of EVERY GRASSROOTS REPUBLICAN in order to keep up -- especially you \-- and we can’t afford to wait another day. | | | | | The Democrats are going to devote every waking moment to seizing control of North Carolina’s Republican Senate Seat, Peter. They’ve already started! They’re prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win -- and they’re going to bring in an army of grassroots donors and volunteers from deep blue states like California and New York to do it. There’s no way we can stop them without your help. We need reinforcements from every state, especially Florida, in order to hold the line. (If we lose North Carolina, our hopes of winning back the Republican Majority are lost! This is that important!) | | | | | | | | | Thank you. \-- North Carolina Republican Party

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: FINAL week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
We are now in our FINAL WEEK of the recall against Gavin Newsom. Voting by mail has been going on for over 3 weeks now, and we're approaching the finish line. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286797:JnKN5L2uN:m:1:3253819041:6D366915DEB4D87038917E6E60282F8D:r)

---
We are now in our FINAL WEEK of the recall against Gavin Newsom. Voting by mail has been going on for over 3 weeks now, and we're approaching the finish line.

When the recall against Newsom began over a year ago, the corporate media and radical Left wrote us off. Now, **we 're just days away from finally holding Newsom accountable** for his overreaching control, his hypocrisy, and his countless failures.

**This final week is the most critical of the whole recall effort.** We're pushing to secure every last ballot in support of the recall that we can, so can pull off a historic defeat of the leftist establishment that has destroyed California.

We need your help to keep our voter outreach operations fully funded so we can secure the votes we need to finish the job of recalling Newsom.

[**Will you stick with us through this FINAL WEEK and help secure the victory we 've been working toward for over a year with a critical contribution of $10, $25, $50 or $100 or more to Larry Elder's ballot committee?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286797:JnKN5L2uN:m:1:3253819041:6D366915DEB4D87038917E6E60282F8D:r)

We're coming up fast on the finish line, and the ONLY way we're going to win is if we don't take our foot off the gas. [**Please send in your critical continued support to help us pull this off and recall Gavin Newsom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286797:JnKN5L2uN:m:1:3253819041:6D366915DEB4D87038917E6E60282F8D:r)

Thanks,

Lou Barnett, Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**HELP US RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286797:JnKN5L2uN:m:1:3253819041:6D366915DEB4D87038917E6E60282F8D:r)

| PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
Committee major funding from:
Elder for Governor 2021
Geoff Palmer
Saul Fox

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Add your name if you agree we need a complete overhaul of US infrastructure to keep up with climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

During last week’s hurricane, many of my constituents experienced flooding in their homes, lost power, and were unable to access public transportation. In total, nearly 20 people in New York State died; I was devastated to hear that three of those individuals were residents of my district.
Our country’s aging infrastructure only contributes to the problem of climate disaster. If we do not mobilize the resources necessary to overhaul housing and public transportation in accordance with climate change, we will only see more unnecessary suffering.
[**Add your name here if you agree that we need a significant overhaul of our country’s infrastructure to meet the demands of climate change.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35425872/305022196/-549960582?refcode2=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210908-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2NlYzE0YS1jZDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGPNGGUFRqhwpZbxnUJJdyw3YLJr9R7drtgnkXG8_h4=&emci=be811d64-b310-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35425873/305022197/730001281?refcode2=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210908-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2NlYzE0YS1jZDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGPNGGUFRqhwpZbxnUJJdyw3YLJr9R7drtgnkXG8_h4=&emci=be811d64-b310-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)**
These infrastructure improvements are a key aspect of the Green New Deal, and it’s on us to pass them as soon as possible to prevent any more unnecessary loss of life. In New York City, several individuals died because flooding trapped them in basement apartments. This is completely unconscionable, and we can’t let it happen again.
The truth is that the climate crisis is already here, and we are not prepared for the destruction that will come.
I’ve talked extensively about decarbonization and holding companies that contribute to pollution accountable, but we also need a massive overhaul of infrastructure to keep people safe in the short term.
[**Add your name here if you agree that we need a significant overhaul of our country’s infrastructure to meet the demands of climate change.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35425874/305022198/-549960582?refcode2=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210908-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2NlYzE0YS1jZDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGPNGGUFRqhwpZbxnUJJdyw3YLJr9R7drtgnkXG8_h4=&emci=be811d64-b310-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f3cec14a-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
Thank you for reading, and I hope that you and your family were able to stay safe during Hurricane Ida.
\- Mondaire

name: Alicia Pardo
subject: Hey team 👋
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m Alicia, Nikki’s new finance consultant. I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and give you an update on where we stand for September.

I’m incredibly proud to be a part of this team, and I know that with your help, we can defeat Ron DeSantis next year.

New polling shows Ron DeSantis’ net approval down 14 points since July. Nikki is the only candidate who can stop him, but we’ll need your help to defeat DeSantis and his army of GOP megadonors.

Team, if you can step up today with a contribution to Nikki’s campaign, it will go directly towards stopping Ron DeSantis. Please click here to chip in now and help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-alicia-sept]

Our campaign to keep the pressure on Ron DeSantis is working thanks to supporters like you.

Every single poll over the past two months has shown him vulnerable. That’s because Floridians are fed up with his gross politicization of COVID.

Here’s the bottom line; Nikki can defeat Ron DeSantis, but only if supporters like you continue to step up. Please click here to chip in now and help power our campaign to stop America’s most dangerous governor. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-alicia-sept]

Thanks,
Alicia

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m running to defeat Ron DeSantis

Dear Derek,

When qualified women stand up and fight for change, we're often told to step aside and wait our turn. Like thousands of people across Florida, I've been underestimated for my entire life.

As Florida’s only statewide elected Democrat, I’ve taken on the NRA, fought climate change, legalized hemp, confronted historic racism, and stood up for Floridians’ rights. But like so many of you, I’ve run up against Florida’s corrupt system every time I’ve fought for change.

**[I’m running because after more than 20 years of Republican governors, it’s time for something new. | | Peter,

In just six days, Californians will cast their ballots in a recall election designed to remove Governor Gavin Newsom from office.

This process was put into place 110 years ago to hold corrupt politicians accountable — and today, it’s become an abuse of power. That’s why I’m voting NO to recall Governor Newsom — and I’m personally asking you to make a plan to vote next Tuesday, September 14th. [**_If you have questions about how to cast your ballot, click here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35427273/305027108/-732795384?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210908_1_1&refcode2=0230586d-cf10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjMwNTg2ZC1jZjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBUdpFnaHtD-_yw3mqNtpAO4qTrYe52p97NyihHDfV8=&emci=9c0880a3-cd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0230586d-cf10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)

name: Max Steiner
subject: Second largest wildfire in California's history (Dixie).
body:
This scene may look normal, but it's not. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35427329/305027256/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTY4Njk4ZC1jZjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajWpnLntdvTNA98ggzvfm-P7lXO3HxiYbxmmrxPUlnA=)
Friend,

This is a longer email about the very real impacts of climate change and the wildland fires raging across the North State. Please read it, then consider supporting my campaign for Congress.

Here's a photo of a campaign stop I recently made in Greenville:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35427330/305027266/-109236511?refcode=em-9821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTY4Njk4ZC1jZjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajWpnLntdvTNA98ggzvfm-P7lXO3HxiYbxmmrxPUlnA=)
**This scene may look normal, but it's not. Sadly, this photo was taken just before the family lost their home to the Dixie Fire when the town burned to the ground.**

The Dixie Fire is well on its way to becoming the largest wildfire in California's history. It's burned more than 914,655 acres and is 58% contained.

We're no strangers to the consequences of our climate crisis. My own brother lost his home to the Carr Fire in 2018, which raged in Shasta and Trinity Counties.

This is a major reason why I'm in this race. We don't lack solutions to wildfires -- we lack the political willpower and bipartisan resolve to implement them. We need to elect leaders who get to work solving these problems. Our current Congressman Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling to do this.

**The North State is ready for change, but I'll need support to get to Washington so I can make a difference.**

Thanks for reading, and thanks in advance for any support.

Max

clean_body: This scene may look normal, but it's not. | = Friend, This is a longer email about the very real impacts of climate change and the wildland fires raging across the North State. Please read it, then consider supporting my campaign for Congress. Here's a photo of a campaign stop I recently made in Greenville: = This scene may look normal, but it's not. Sadly, this photo was taken just before the family lost their home to the Dixie Fire when the town burned to the ground. The Dixie Fire is well on its way to becoming the largest wildfire in California's history. It's burned more than 914,655 acres and is 58% contained. We're no strangers to the consequences of our climate crisis. My own brother lost his home to the Carr Fire in 2018, which raged in Shasta and Trinity Counties. This is a major reason why I'm in this race. We don't lack solutions to wildfires -- we lack the political willpower and bipartisan resolve to implement them. We need to elect leaders who get to work solving these problems. Our current Congressman Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling to do this. The North State is ready for change, but I'll need support to get to Washington so I can make a difference. Thanks for reading, and thanks in advance for any support. Max | = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. body:

| Hey Friend, I am Dr. Kelli Ward, the Chairman of the Arizona Republican Party, the first America First, Republican Party in the country.
On September 26th, I will be attending a fundraiser for Laurel Imer at the Dunafon Castle in Idledale, CO. Joining me at this event will be my friend and fellow Arizonan, Pinal County Sheriff Mark Lamb, and Former Congressman from CO-06 Tom Tancredo.
I am writing you today to invite you to join me and my husband, Mike, at this fundraiser for Laurel.
I have known Laurel and her son Weston for quite some time and I know that Laurel is an amazing mother, a staunch supporter of the America First Movement and that she will never back down or compromise her principles in the face of the far left attacks or the censorship from big tech.
When Laurel asked me in July at the Rally to Protect our Elections in Phoenix, with my good friend and our 45th President, Donald J. Trump, if I would support her candidacy in Colorado, I responded with a resounding Yes and that is why I am writing you today.
Laurel needs your support in order to defeat the radical agenda of the far left in Colorado. The Democrat party knows that Ed Perlmutter is vulnerable and they also know that Laurel will defeat him in 2022. So you know that the Dems and Nancy Pelosi are going to throw everything they have at Laurel in this fight.
Tickets are selling fast for this event and I want to meet you, so please click below and purchase your ticket now before space runs out.

Tickets are selling fast for this event and I want to meet you, so please click below and purchase your ticket now before space runs out. | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | Join Laurel, The Sheriff, Congressman Tancredo, and I for Brunch, Mimosas, and Bloody Marys as we visit and talk about America's Audit, Border Security, and how to take back CD7. As I mentioned before, tickets are going fast and there is only a handful of seats remaining. Select General Admission, Couples General Admission, VIP, Couples VIP, or one of the great ticket packages for this once-in-a-lifetime event at the Dunafon Castle. I hope that I can count on your presence and support of Laurel on the 26th and I look forward to spending the day with you all! name: Laura Loomer
subject: Latrine Rats. Ugh.
body:
Every once in a while, I'd love to write you and just tell you about how nice of a day it was and send you pictures of my puppies, but nooo, some idiot always has to try and ruin my day.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3OSm8OVbgnsK4mAHxydXw/N5tGKaAJQ59UnCbG05xnVA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3OSm8OVbgnsK4mAHxydXw/N5tGKaAJQ59UnCbG05xnVA) Every once in a while, I'd love to write you and just tell you about how nice of a day it was and send you pictures of my puppies, but nooo, some idiot always has to try and ruin my day.

But this one is pretty funny.

Rick Wilson is a co-founder of the Lincoln Project - the group of "Republicans" who spent tens of millions of dollars against President Trump and America First candidates last year.

When asked about my race, here's what this so-called "Republican strategist" had to say:
**" Loomer may be vile, personally repugnant, wildly immoral and crazier than a latrine rat, but Republican primary elections now reward rather than punish that kind of behavior."**
There is some truth to Wilson's quote if you apply it to his work with the Lincoln Project.

Acting vile, immoral and betraying principles for profit is ABSOLUTELY admired and rewarded on the left.

Before Wilson and shady friends formed the Lincoln Project, Rick Wilson's career was at an obvious low point.

As the _New York Post_ reported, before finding financial success stabbing President Trump in the back, Wilson owed $389k in federal taxes and in 2016, his bank started to foreclose on his home.

Even American Express went after Wilson after he couldn't pay the $25,729 he racked up on his card.

I'd bet that Wilson is out of financial problems now that the Lincoln Project has raised nearly $100 million from the radical left.

That's just a guess, because **the left loves and rewards a turncoat**.

But as they say, "easy come, easy go,"

Wilson and his Lincoln Project buddies took a hard crash when one of their co-founders, John Weaver, got caught making sexual overtures to a young man.

No, wait, I'm sorry.

**Rick Wilson 's friend and Lincoln Project co-founder was accused by TWENTY-ONE young men of inappropriate sexual conduct - even pressuring them for sexual favors in exchange for jobs!**

So sure, the "Republican" Lincoln Project guy can call me and any other woman a "crazy latrine rat" all he wants, it just goes to show the hypocrisy and the lack of character that has infected so many so-called leaders in our party.

Many RINO turncoats like Rick Wilson have always lacked the moral foundation to lead. They're not fit to be men, much less Republicans.

Others like my oppenent Dan Webster lack the energy to fight and lead in these perilous times. They slip in, cling to power and sit back for decades or more hoping no one notices they have done nothing to protect or serve our nation.

While we can't do much for Rick Wilson except pray for the man, we can do something about the Dan Webster's of our party [**. . . replace them**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3OSm8OVbgnsK4mAHxydXw/N5tGKaAJQ59UnCbG05xnVA).

[**And you can help me with that.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e3OSm8OVbgnsK4mAHxydXw/N5tGKaAJQ59UnCbG05xnVA)

Thanks again for everything that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: Every once in a while, I'd love to write you and just tell you about how nice of a day it was and send you pictures of my puppies, but nooo, some idiot always has to try and ruin my day. | | | Patriot, Every once in a while, I'd love to write you and just tell you about how nice of a day it was and send you pictures of my puppies, but nooo, some idiot always has to try and ruin my day. But this one is pretty funny. Rick Wilson is a co-founder of the Lincoln Project - the group of "Republicans" who spent tens of millions of dollars against President Trump and America First candidates last year. When asked about my race, here's what this so-called "Republican strategist" had to say: " Loomer may be vile, personally repugnant, wildly immoral and crazier than a latrine rat, but Republican primary elections now reward rather than punish that kind of behavior." There is some truth to Wilson's quote if you apply it to his work with the Lincoln Project. Acting vile, immoral and betraying principles for profit is ABSOLUTELY admired and rewarded on the left. Before Wilson and shady friends formed the Lincoln Project, Rick Wilson's career was at an obvious low point. As the New York Post reported, before finding financial success stabbing President Trump in the back, Wilson owed $389k in federal taxes and in 2016, his bank started to foreclose on his home. Even American Express went after Wilson after he couldn't pay the $25,729 he racked up on his card. I'd bet that Wilson is out of financial problems now that the Lincoln Project has raised nearly $100 million from the radical left. That's just a guess, because the left loves and rewards a turncoat. But as they say, "easy come, easy go," Wilson and his Lincoln Project buddies took a hard crash when one of their co-founders, John Weaver, got caught making sexual overtures to a young man. No, wait, I'm sorry. Rick Wilson 's friend and Lincoln Project co-founder was accused by TWENTY-ONE young men of inappropriate sexual conduct - even pressuring them for sexual favors in exchange for jobs! So sure, the "Republican" Lincoln Project guy can call me and any other woman a "crazy latrine rat" all he wants, it just goes to show the hypocrisy and the lack of character that has infected so many so-called leaders in our party. Many RINO turncoats like Rick Wilson have always lacked the moral foundation to lead. They're not fit to be men, much less Republicans. Others like my oppenent Dan Webster lack the energy to fight and lead in these perilous times. They slip in, cling to power and sit back for decades or more hoping no one notices they have done nothing to protect or serve our nation. While we can't do much for Rick Wilson except pray for the man, we can do something about the Dan Webster's of our party . Thanks again for everything that you do. | | **It is clear:** Tom is the only candidate in this race with a long and proven track record of helping working class Wisconsinites. He was raised in a blue-collar union neighborhood where all the families worked at the local paper mill and has spent his life in the Fox Valley fighting for his community, not in New York or Washington D.C. He’s even written a book about working with unions to help save the century-old paper mill in his community.

Tom has always stood on the side of hard-working Wisconsinites, against the big banks looking to lay off workers to fatten CEO salaries — _and he will continue to do so as Senator._

**That is why Tom spent Monday marching in Labor Day parades meeting with hard-working Wisconsinites, and why our campaign has the endorsements of a dozen labor groups and leaders.**

He was raised in a blue-collar union neighborhood where all the families worked at the local paper mill and has spent his life in the Fox Valley fighting for his community, not in New York or Washington D.C. He’s even written a book about working with unions to help save the century-old paper mill in his community. Tom has always stood on the side of hard-working Wisconsinites, against the big banks looking to lay off workers to fatten CEO salaries — and he will continue to do so as Senator. That is why Tom spent Monday marching in Labor Day parades meeting with hard-working Wisconsinites, and why our campaign has the endorsements of a dozen labor groups and leaders. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = Listen, The labor movement is the heart of the Democratic party — and yet, union workers across our state continue to be exploited and denied dignity or are seeing their livelihoods threatened as jobs get shipped to foreign countries. It’s time for Congress to step up and pass policies that will benefit all workers. Congress must pass the PRO Act, raise the minimum wage, stop unfair free trade agreements, and remake our economy for the middle class. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Wisconsin has a rich tradition of organized labor and political movements for worker’s rights. As a Senator, Tom will carry on that tradition by always putting working people first. Thanks for your support, Nelson HQ | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=c7b8a9da860c434b91e140c9a8238a10&_e=BzH5pKJdGj5vvyS1zGk9Yzlgt-qHcWMsZR-RAVHAYxV_jG4x3_NNYJND6DVnPFRWBdeKiMkZwYDD37_vY7z9j1xXLTNPdg9Bct1N6HWflzQbqRw4rcygo0URayi3GgiL8XU_ih307Yvp-zKtpOV7R_lwY6VJGBasBKuJmzkjuKKnAhOQ6q982yf3zD5MfeAn9XLkpPkylpr6neb-K2P3eHkd2kx6mp9UJPSpxnZd9V1oygTNRwf-YnSLdUIPwYsdG7Cq5WCGH-Ied8CGbIhr4dhIeWPcMX8-gCD9kHLR2ghq69s7gXI3ycO8kjZisfuRbaQFAYxFDdLBItql8m5k8vNKVoTHE09CNHyMocSFUpEM7WGCX2WvpPgb78zon7JdEu7gjxyU5xIl_aGZBzkCkVhwpgyqZHhOKeQKdzPpmHvc0XZlBqtPh8Ui8hfU4iF0a0NiSIDTApGoKhp0LXA9xg%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. body:
There’s a chance Lauren Boebert could try and flip my seat. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35430401/305038351/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFhNzhmNS1kODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXSndPAgSwXXfyYd0U0gqQUUC6hupYgs8pP1KoUBzBk=)
Hi folks, Colorado’s redistricting commission just came out with its proposed new lines for our congressional district, and here’s the bottom line: **_Under this new map, Lauren Boebert and I reside in the same district._** There’s now a real possibility we’ll be going head-to-head in next year’s midterm elections. And with National Republicans already targeting Michael’s seat, this is an opportunity for them to double down on their efforts to flip Colorado, so we’re counting on your support. Needless to say, the contrast between Lauren Boebert and me could not be clearer. She rejected the results of the 2020 election, and voted against the expanded Child Tax Credit that has helped over one million Colorado children. We can’t let her win this seat, and we can’t let our guard down when it comes to defending our Democratic majority in Congress and continuing to deliver for Coloradans. Michael and I need your support so we can take on whatever comes next. So I have to ask: **Will you split a $10 donation between Michael and my re-election campaign so we can keep Colorado blue?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Michael Bennet and Joe Neguse will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35430402/305038352/1445021051?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_FL_20210908_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFhNzhmNS1kODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXSndPAgSwXXfyYd0U0gqQUUC6hupYgs8pP1KoUBzBk=)**

clean_body: There’s a chance Lauren Boebert could try and flip my seat. | = Hi folks, Colorado’s redistricting commission just came out with its proposed new lines for our congressional district, and here’s the bottom line: Under this new map, Lauren Boebert and I reside in the same district. There’s now a real possibility we’ll be going head-to-head in next year’s midterm elections. And with National Republicans already targeting Michael’s seat, this is an opportunity for them to double down on their efforts to flip Colorado, so we’re counting on your support. Needless to say, the contrast between Lauren Boebert and me could not be clearer. She rejected the results of the 2020 election, and voted against the expanded Child Tax Credit that has helped over one million Colorado children. We can’t let her win this seat, and we can’t let our guard down when it comes to defending our Democratic majority in Congress and continuing to deliver for Coloradans. Michael and I need your support so we can take on whatever comes next. So I have to ask: Will you split a $10 donation between Michael and my re-election campaign so we can keep Colorado blue? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Michael Bennet and Joe Neguse will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you and talk soon, Joe Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| The Intercept published a report that includes over 900 pages of jaw-dropping documents that prove Fauci's role in the creation of deadly viruses. According to the report, Fauci's agency, the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, provided grants to the Wuhan lab, including "$599,000 that the Wuhan Institute of Virology used in part to identify and alter bat coronaviruses likely to infect humans." Let me repeat that again: Fauci used your money as a taxpayer to pay a Chinese lab to "alter bat coronaviruses likely to infect humans." That's bad enough. But here's the worst part: Fauci still thinks he did nothing wrong. And if he didn't learn his lesson the first time, that means he'd do it again. ****_I must stand up and fight back immediately, or these mad scientists may well cook up an even worse virus -- one that makes COVID look like nothing._ This funding must be cut off forever. Not one more penny for gain-of-function research! I have sent a criminal referral against Fauci to the Department of Justice for lying under oath about participating in gain-of-function research. But if I'm going to prevent this funding from ever taking place again, I have to hold on to my seat in the U.S. Senate. And the Left is coming after my seat -- hard. clean_body: and it's about time... | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Anthony Fauci was just exposed in a bombshell report. And I have sent a criminal referral against him to the Department of Justice. Remember all the times I took him on in front of the United States Senate? The media took his side by spewing lies about me and covering up his unethical schemes. But now the truth has come out. Fauci funded gain-of-function research. And even the media can't ignore it anymore. I joined Hannity to talk about the report that finally revealed his lies. You can watch it . | | The Intercept published a report that includes over 900 pages of jaw-dropping documents that prove Fauci's role in the creation of deadly viruses. According to the report, Fauci's agency, the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, provided grants to the Wuhan lab, including "$599,000 that the Wuhan Institute of Virology used in part to identify and alter bat coronaviruses likely to infect humans." Let me repeat that again: Fauci used your money as a taxpayer to pay a Chinese lab to "alter bat coronaviruses likely to infect humans." That's bad enough. But here's the worst part: Fauci still thinks he did nothing wrong. And if he didn't learn his lesson the first time, that means he'd do it again. **I must stand up and fight back immediately, or these mad scientists may well cook up an even worse virus -- one that makes COVID look like nothing. This funding must be cut off forever. Not one more penny for gain-of-function research! I have sent a criminal referral against Fauci to the Department of Justice for lying under oath about participating in gain-of-function research. But if I'm going to prevent this funding from ever taking place again, I have to hold on to my seat in the U.S. Senate. And the Left is coming after my seat -- hard. I can only stop this dangerous scheme if I keep my seat in the U.S. Senate. And that's where patriots like you come in. My Bernie-supporting socialist opponent has the funding of wealthy liberals across the country. But I have freedom-loving conservatives like you. I am counting on you to help me get over the finish line in this critical election so that I can stop Fauci from funding these dangerous science experiments. That is my mission in the U.S. Senate -- to protect Americans from reckless bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci. But I can only do that if I hang on to my Senate seat. And that's why I need your help immediately. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | **** P.S. Anthony Fauci's role in funding the creation of deadly viruses was just exposed. And I have sent a criminal referral to the Department of Justice against him for the lies that he told in front of the U.S. Senate. His agency gave a jaw-dropping amount of money to the Chinese Communist Party to fund experiments that made viruses more deadly. I have taken on Fauci at every turn, and I am doing everything I can to prevent this kind of deadly scheme from ever taking place again. But if the Left takes me out in my Senate race next year, I will be helpless to stop any of it. That’s why I need you right now. ** | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Our game plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is our path to victory.
#
Peter,
Together, we’re building a winning U.S. Senate campaign for the long run — from now through the Democratic primary and all the way through Election Day in November 2022.
**The first stepping stone on our path to victory is raising as much money as possible early-on.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29820?refcode=em20210908-2558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2558%2E434096%2EDfSy9g)
No, we’re not kidding around, Peter.
**A donation of $5 made *right now* — while it’s still early-on in the Democratic primary — makes the single-biggest impact on what we're able to build.**
_In fact, your donation today will have an even bigger impact than that same amount made really close to Election Day, because it allows our campaign to invest in a long-term strategy for victory. Boom._
[**_Will you please make a donation of $5 or more to sustain our campaign for the long run into 2022? With our biggest FEC fundraising deadline yet at the end of September, it’s critical that we raise as much money as possible NOW so we have the resources to grow our campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29820?refcode=em20210908-2558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2558%2E434096%2EDfSy9g)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29820?refcode=em20210908-2558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2558%2E434096%2EDfSy9g)**
In unity,
Team Fetterman
P.S. The #1 way to support our campaign in the *future* months ahead is by making a donation in the *present* today. [**_If you’re in a place to do so, please make a contribution of $5 or another amount to our campaign today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29820?refcode=em20210908-2558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2558%2E434096%2EDfSy9g)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210908-2558-footer-test-ctrl&t=27&refcode2=2558_434096_DfSy9g&akid=2558%2E434096%2EDfSy9g)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Rand Paul
subject: I was right. Fauci LIED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** _**[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)**_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r) | |
---
Peter, I've been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about school closures. Now he's lying about whether or not he funded the gain of function research that led to the COVID-19.

HINT: He did.

Thousands of documents were already available to the public when I called Fauci out in a July hearing, but as of today, 900 more documents have been released to PROVE Dr. Fauci approved funding for gain of function research at the Wuhan Virology Lab. _(Yes, that one.)_
[**FIRE FAUCI: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
The truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

He refused to retract his lies.

He didn't even bother to cover up the paper trail that proved him wrong!

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287478:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287479:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287480:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287481:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

Even the media-approved "experts" in microbiology are agreeing with ME now that Fauci was behind this whole pandemic. Richard Ebright, a molecular biologist at Rutgers, read the grants revealed this week and he says there's no DOUBT that Fauci was "untruthful" about his role in funding COVID-19.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)
_There you have it._

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2842554/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58287477:6t0cRL2Nz:m:1:3253819041:6A6A4BCD2697C81B1B952069241E0F39:r)

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Here's the deal, team. **The fate of our Senate majority hinges on this race.** With the Senate split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only has to flip ONE seat to regain control of the Senate, and Republicans across the country are laser-focused on New Hampshire. Millions of dollars are already being dumped into this race, and **this is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in Granite State history.** In a swing state like New Hampshire, the path to winning is a marathon, not a sprint. That's why Team Maggie is working hard to build a strong campaign foundation. From on-the-ground organizers to TV and digital ads, we're gearing up as early as possible to ensure that we reach every Granite Stater. I'm reaching out today because the end of this month is our biggest FEC deadline to date. Everything we've raised will become public record, giving Republicans and potential opponents a look into the strength of our campaign. A strong fundraising number will show the GOP that flipping this seat won’t be easy. But, if we come up short, it will only invite millions more in dark money. **[As we head toward the most important FEC deadline of this campaign, I have to ask: will you make a $5 contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35432013/305043914/-149339129?refcode=e20210908_aj-fec-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBlNzAyNS1kZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbPTU15C6B1HpMk4wNHgzKYNmd-fb16T4VIsgGdIKgA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35432014/305043915/-149339129?refcode=e20210908_aj-fec-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBlNzAyNS1kZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbPTU15C6B1HpMk4wNHgzKYNmd-fb16T4VIsgGdIKgA=)

But what they don’t have is the grassroots donors like you that are helping our campaign build the momentum we need to win. | ******=>>**** Folks, if everyone reading this email chips in just $5, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back against these dark money groups. body:

| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yddZKOw8YLbIIj32hMMpUZmK1EJ425HWq3oebSZnUaW6Z42mj0NKdaZJyIN-VtFhLGM8HsBtsEv-1efQsNXDp4_OsD3jPETOBcqbJG0gV2YMZLFrf2mRS_VqIzzCpEu5OoUMtgUcVeweRk5pnfWrIu_hU_zceFR30UU_cwmeq35meAGYwtAGOg==&c=fKKtfWijtWyCxhIXB8-olL6ZNuJ0rY6IYHW4xJW2RPMnGkxddWzWuQ==&ch=zcMlUTxjtXf_-TAwXyEeE8AnEBPSYvxLEUuChMs7ctG46p062RRSCA==)

| Peter,
Did you see the breaking news yesterday? Well, It should come as no surprise that Sen. Rand Paul was right yet again. Dr. Anthony Facui LIED in his testimony to Congress when he claimed that the National Institutes of Health (NIH) did not fund gain-of-function research in Wuhan, China.
[Fox News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yddZKOw8YLbIIj32hMMpUZmK1EJ425HWq3oebSZnUaW6Z42mj0NKdasml6KfxW37xFnIfbL2U2KYfiAQbiE0eRuAy9hA8eaoAI4-bd_WyN2erDlZUSwRkzQwTsr-BE4WT8Hs0gwfVmHpyLH5wzqBZNb1T5mIgoittB1LgxZ8w9gfMM4iKR27ieNHOW9xDtqeZPUSnzLHqu0RBdytu8N-gw==&c=fKKtfWijtWyCxhIXB8-olL6ZNuJ0rY6IYHW4xJW2RPMnGkxddWzWuQ==&ch=zcMlUTxjtXf_-TAwXyEeE8AnEBPSYvxLEUuChMs7ctG46p062RRSCA==)

---
| According to information unearthed by [The Intercept](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yddZKOw8YLbIIj32hMMpUZmK1EJ425HWq3oebSZnUaW6Z42mj0NKdasml6KfxW37cqMLc4zYDZSh_Jag2NzOW0Q09-NdbwYT5jmgnY4A5_K_W2pqhE_321YQMWsAzIihBPZmL6yjENtLHg-k637gJMLTyJtJ919TyHkIkUQ4dbhG42atISv8E0xt5IbcS3MUUPjbiCPyTX13xo-WDqWcWhXBrBgmEZR9BGUhEjZy4wzw6sIcivyx4v14ZqBxtfFB&c=fKKtfWijtWyCxhIXB8-olL6ZNuJ0rY6IYHW4xJW2RPMnGkxddWzWuQ==&ch=zcMlUTxjtXf_-TAwXyEeE8AnEBPSYvxLEUuChMs7ctG46p062RRSCA==) via a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) inquiry, $3.1 million of our tax dollars "funded research on several types of coronaviruses at the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yddZKOw8YLbIIj32hMMpUZmK1EJ425HWq3oebSZnUaW6Z42mj0NKdasml6KfxW37cqMLc4zYDZSh_Jag2NzOW0Q09-NdbwYT5jmgnY4A5_K_W2pqhE_321YQMWsAzIihBPZmL6yjENtLHg-k637gJMLTyJtJ919TyHkIkUQ4dbhG42atISv8E0xt5IbcS3MUUPjbiCPyTX13xo-WDqWcWhXBrBgmEZR9BGUhEjZy4wzw6sIcivyx4v14ZqBxtfFB&c=fKKtfWijtWyCxhIXB8-olL6ZNuJ0rY6IYHW4xJW2RPMnGkxddWzWuQ==&ch=zcMlUTxjtXf_-TAwXyEeE8AnEBPSYvxLEUuChMs7ctG46p062RRSCA==)
---
| Rand Paul has been the ONLY Senator willing to step up and call out Dr. Fauci on his lies. This is why I am honored to have [Sen. Paul's endorsement in my bid for U.S. Senate. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yddZKOw8YLbIIj32hMMpUZmK1EJ425HWq3oebSZnUaW6Z42mj0NKdasml6KfxW37to9atI_FbPXISXHGGbQYB3-YW72NlHOkWO8CL6v_1RZS_SX-hGzBaPeIOo4_bzXscyEQpookrhrHjSZJeZf2LAyCO7qbaxIEchzBll6QwrFkNv4YYnCPIuyCJpj1fkqlSceM2ouApusGmeBfvE0O5w==&c=fKKtfWijtWyCxhIXB8-olL6ZNuJ0rY6IYHW4xJW2RPMnGkxddWzWuQ==&ch=zcMlUTxjtXf_-TAwXyEeE8AnEBPSYvxLEUuChMs7ctG46p062RRSCA==)
I look forward to joining Sen. Paul in Washington to hold people, like Facui, accountable for lying to congress and their incompetent "leadership."
---
|

| It is time to Fire Fauci.
In Liberty,

| Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate
