name: Brian Hawkins
subject: Democrats have a $90 MILLION Racist Slush Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want our votes with no solutions The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want our votes with no solutions! | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c465d5b9fd154c07867ed588a1835b7e&_e=07b-FKgVpu0BSogQE4B-PFTHbZXUElABAO46P8laQg3n9T2j9Gmfk_aoB1_sZTnbANG_UaDj-BACk4oV0_tqbAbdt8dGQLMigNmIdmnpLddQ0fuQuDbDRdzc_VTDxR27A45sBqxDBqL40dV7LH0yQy0nNZwxd-2SLMjv5K71ZeuCJWpMYw84VTbMAmgboR-MIPSz2IYVyGgB3H2pPCNNR67GtU4a04sse1JNdnPnEFviUS4dQ6L8sfmfcrv7iSwFouR9kFx9Q3k8IGHbCuxb7NQ8UejJaTMISRCGyV1-U05iZuj5pndAOd8UxuDa8zqTbTtLmnv9aRmbcnawRLK3T8aB95XvPgYFud1H1EURMojGOOZHnOowijox087pSZBwjUdtC1HC88FlGmSr1ynVPSHPz4jYW__yOcWuHC-So3vp4J8nOhQsciH8jFj8bbB_UQMHDao9YXKNMvWikiwZblfJSpgDNTxGRAsB1pi5DN-PVO1L75M42Z57EIYekxt6)
---
Peter,

The average donation to the Black Lives Matter Organization in 2020 was $30. **Radical Democrats fooled Americans into donating over 90 MILLION to this racist organization to fund their campaigns.**

These donors contributed thinking their hard-earned money was going towards a racial justice movement seeking to help black communities. **That couldn't be further from the truth...**

[**I am black conservative pastor running for Congress and exposing the TRUTH behind the BLM movement.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c465d5b9fd154c07867ed588a1835b7e&_e=07b-FKgVpu0BSogQE4B-PFTHbZXUElABAO46P8laQg3n9T2j9Gmfk_aoB1_sZTnbANG_UaDj-BACk4oV0_tqbAbdt8dGQLMigNmIdmnpLddQ0fuQuDbDRdzc_VTDxR27A45sBqxDBqL40dV7LH0yQy0nNZwxd-2SLMjv5K71ZeuCJWpMYw84VTbMAmgboR-MIPSz2IYVyGgB3H2pPCNNR67GtU4a04sse1JNdnPnEFviUS4dQ6L8sfmfcrv7iSwFouR9kFx9Q3k8IGHbCuxb7NQ8UejJaTMISRCGyV1-U05QoVqL6U50iZiQuaf255fnp41a4bMUVcQpP7vcXhzXyxPiS6315-FkSJzduj834_UljNrgxPS5tFv_0wvEFHzLZwrPoI2gAH_HunBL-70l4GnskWxgKBaHFUNbPKV-TX3HXtd--D3FjQna-siU-qIPca7Q__cFPKdXNiURmmlZlsRnt-Gm3pIIrpP-mpFRbivtiLhWQ7mnx_wdOYLeUB_H) It's imperative that you understand my story so you can see I have nothing to gain by putting a target on my back...

As a City Councilman, I set my office up right in the heart of my city, on a park bench where my constituents could join me at any point of the day.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c465d5b9fd154c07867ed588a1835b7e&_e=07b-FKgVpu0BSogQE4B-PFTHbZXUElABAO46P8laQg3n9T2j9Gmfk_aoB1_sZTnbANG_UaDj-BACk4oV0_tqbAbdt8dGQLMigNmIdmnpLddQ0fuQuDbDRdzc_VTDxR27A45sBqxDBqL40dV7LH0yQy0nNZwxd-2SLMjv5K71ZeuCJWpMYw84VTbMAmgboR-MIPSz2IYVyGgB3H2pPCNNR67GtU4a04sse1JNdnPnEFviUS4dQ6L8sfmfcrv7iSwFouR9kFx9Q3k8IGHbCuxb7NQ8UejJaTMISRCGyV1-U06RRzqUP3PG38tdPdT_wShDlFIJHl2FKrkDkbvDGvCi7v5wyjzjZTE4T4q_rXappTjubKnjY7wRdhbffBkzuHtcRUwHIFPxpKXapz8lwAZdZmafOxcwQgoa2d24BfIAKbh6iyfb8K7Lm3AsMpAVNeU55drv090r3pQVgfQNa6oAj3DYM_iQVkcX_1tlucLRN_9_ev-DH9ultxrQzXlcJh-a)
When I saw the homelessness and drug use in my city, I knew I needed to take a stand and clean up the streets where my children now play. **But our Democrat leaders have peddled the idea that the answer to these problems in minority communities are more liberal leaders in Washington.**

**News flash: They're not.** The answer to cleaning up your city is building relationships within your community - something very few politicians do. So, I inserted myself right in the heart of my town, where I can see the problems with my own two eyes and work to fix them with my own two hands.

I have partnered with law enforcement agencies, not attacked them in the name of "social justice" like Democrats across the nation. **And you know what we saw? A SAFER, more UNITED community.**

As a conservative black man, I understand what the Democrats are doing because I know people that have fallen for it. clean_body: The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want our votes with no solutions The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want our votes with no solutions! | Peter, The average donation to the Black Lives Matter Organization in 2020 was $30. Radical Democrats fooled Americans into donating over 90 MILLION to this racist organization to fund their campaigns. These donors contributed thinking their hard-earned money was going towards a racial justice movement seeking to help black communities. That couldn't be further from the truth... It's imperative that you understand my story so you can see I have nothing to gain by putting a target on my back... As a City Councilman, I set my office up right in the heart of my city, on a park bench where my constituents could join me at any point of the day. When I saw the homelessness and drug use in my city, I knew I needed to take a stand and clean up the streets where my children now play. But our Democrat leaders have peddled the idea that the answer to these problems in minority communities are more liberal leaders in Washington. News flash: They're not. The answer to cleaning up your city is building relationships within your community - something very few politicians do. So, I inserted myself right in the heart of my town, where I can see the problems with my own two eyes and work to fix them with my own two hands. I have partnered with law enforcement agencies, not attacked them in the name of "social justice" like Democrats across the nation. And you know what we saw? A SAFER, more UNITED community. As a conservative black man, I understand what the Democrats are doing because I know people that have fallen for it. I am asking every conservative tired of the Left's race-hustling agenda to pitch in just $15 to my campaign immediately - which is only HALF of the average donation to BLM. The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want to give us "symbolic gestures" thinking it will satisfy us rather than help with actual problems in the community. They just want our votes with no solutions! Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Giffords.org
subject: Back-to-school season

body:
It’s a horrible reality to think that schools being closed during the pandemic is the reason why our students have been safe from school shootings.
#

**Less than two weeks into the school year, a teenage boy was shot and killed in his North Carolina high school.**
_Less than two weeks into the school year._
It’s a horrible reality to think that schools being closed during the pandemic is the reason why our students have been safe from school shootings. But it’s true — and now we need to prepare for the fact that as students return to classrooms, we are also seeing a return to school shootings and lockdowns.
That’s why we are redoubling our efforts to pass universal background checks so we can make our classrooms and communities safer by preventing these tragedies from ever taking place. So we have to ask:
[**Please, if you can afford it, donate $3 to support our efforts to pass universal background checks and ensure students are safe in their classrooms. As schools are reopening for the first time in over a year, there has never been a more important time to give.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210908-1-15&t=1&refcode2=835_3935704_WEuDJd&akid=835%2E3935704%2EWEuDJd)

name: Anna Kelly - Communications Director
subject: The Democrats' Senate disaster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Friend,
Did you see the latest news on the Democrats' disastrous field for U.S. Senate?
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58764961:s_5edUdGN:m:1:2068296031:534A416AE6AFCCFD977A7419CC5B8433:r)
Milwaukee Alderwoman and Democrat candidate for U.S. Senate Chantia Lewis was accused of embezzling over $20,000 in taxpayer dollars and campaign funds for a multi-year spending binge to pay for frivolous expenses like meals at Hooters and family trips to the Wisconsin Dells.

[_**The Democrats are lining up all of the crooks, liars, and cheaters they can find to turn our U.S. Senate seat blue next year.**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58764962:s_5edUdGN:m:1:2068296031:534A416AE6AFCCFD977A7419CC5B8433:r)
This is only the most recent incident in the Democrats' series of flubs ahead of 2022. Some of their other candidates include:
* New York trust fund baby Alex Lasry, who jumped the line in front of Wisconsin's elderly for a COVID-19 vaccine and cheated the tax system to get residential tax breaks in both Wisconsin and New York

* DC resident Sarah Godlewski, who lies about her resume and background

* Renowned liar Mandela Barnes, who helped fan the flames of violence in Kenosha, lied about graduating from college, and didn't pay property taxes

**The best of the Democrat field for the U.S. Senate are all disasters -- but that doesn 't mean this will be an easy victory.** Outside groups and coastal liberals are already pouring millions of dollars into ads to disparage Senator Ron Johnson and misrepresent his record in case he decides to run again.
[_**Friend, are you willing to chip in to ensure that we keep Senator Johnson 's U.S. Senate seat red?
**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58764962:s_5edUdGN:m:1:2068296031:534A416AE6AFCCFD977A7419CC5B8433:r)
The Democrats don't care about putting forward quality candidates -- they only care about electing fringe liberals who will support their far-left agenda. **It 's up to us to ensure these horrific candidates don't get elected, but we can't compete with the Democrats' flood of East Coast money without the help of grassroots supporters like you. Are you able to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help fuel our efforts ahead of 2022?**
Thank you,

Anna Kelly
Communications Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin
**
**_**P.S. Elections in Wisconsin are always a game of inches, and every dollar could mean the difference. We could really use your help, Friend.**_
_**[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58764962:s_5edUdGN:m:1:2068296031:534A416AE6AFCCFD977A7419CC5B8433:r)**_

The Democrats don't care about putting forward quality candidates -- they only care about electing fringe liberals who will support their far-left agenda. It 's up to us to ensure these horrific candidates don't get elected, but we can't compete with the Democrats' flood of East Coast money without the help of grassroots supporters like you. Are you able to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help fuel our efforts ahead of 2022? Thank you, Anna Kelly Communications Director Republican Party of Wisconsin P.S. Elections in Wisconsin are always a game of inches, and every dollar could mean the difference. We could really use your help, Friend. ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system May 22, 2018. This is DISASTROUS!

Texas just enacted one of the worst voter suppression laws in America, and here’s the terrifying part -- **if Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin get their way _it could be coming to Virginia next!_**

In just under two months, Virginia’s House of Delegates, Attorney General’s office, and Governor’s office are **_ALL_** up for election, and right now, it’s anyone’s guess who will win.

Since taking back the legislature, Virginia Democrats have fought like hell to make voting easier and more accessible. clean_body: | | | This is DISASTROUS! Texas just enacted one of the worst voter suppression laws in America, and here’s the terrifying part -- if Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin get their way it could be coming to Virginia next! In just under two months, Virginia’s House of Delegates, Attorney General’s office, and Governor’s office are ALL up for election, and right now, it’s anyone’s guess who will win. Since taking back the legislature, Virginia Democrats have fought like hell to make voting easier and more accessible. But if Virginia Republicans sweep the upcoming elections as some are predicting, we can say good-bye to all that and hello to more Trump-style, “big lie” inspired attempts at mass voter suppression. With the election this close, there’s not a moment to lose. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Drew Thompson
subject: Join Jane & Celebrate HALF A MILLION!
body:
500,000 and Climbing... [](https://) **Jane Timken Closes in on Half a Million Voter Contacts** Peter , Before the end of the month, our team will reach 500,000 total voter contacts, **the first 2022 campaign in the country to achieve such a number.** By focusing on Ohio's actual voters, we continue to increase the gap between our campaign and the social media accounts that attempt to pass as our competition. While we have a long way to go until final victory in November, the increasing margin that our ground game is creating is still only accelerating. Jane Timken simply can't be stopped! In 3 weeks, she will be rallying the troops on September 25th, in celebration of our team reaching HALF A MILLION voter contacts. Join her and our team in: Columbus - 10:00AM
Athens - 12:00PM
Cincinnati - 3:30PM We will kick off from Tuscarawas County at 9:00AM and blitz the state all day! Sign up through the link below. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Congressman Gosar endorses Finchem AZ SOS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity train rolls forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f9f4135ce8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

The Election Integrity Movement is gaining huge momentum as America First patriots gather for the cause. Starting last Fall, President Trump said:

**_”Mark Finchem is a real leader in Arizona.”_**

And this weekend, we gained a critical endorsement in my campaign for Secretary of State. But more on that in a moment.

My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the America First Patriot who first paid for the Election integrity hearings in Arizona out-of-pocket. I listened when everyone else covered their ears.

**_I spoke when the rest were silent._**

And now we are leading what is the greatest grassroots movement of a generation, a movement to restore integrity to American elections, and to restore the soul of America.

**_[Are you with me? Can you help our cause with a donation today of $25, $50, $100, or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=635862706f&e=44b8c466b0)_**

That brings me to today. After a valiant effort where we have fought numerous legal attacks on America’s audit in Maricopa County, where we have established indisputable evidence of fraud in Arizona elections, and where we have ignited an election integrity movement that has spread all the way from California to Georgia, we are seeing even more proud patriots join our cause.

**_This is why I am proud to announce the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fc82d48dda&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_My campaign has secured the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar, a staunch defender of Conservative values. He knows that I am a fighter. He knows that I won’t back down to the thieving, radical Left._**
---
|
---
|
---
| Representative Paul Gosar supports me “without hesitation” to be our next Secretary of State in Arizona. This is huge.

**Words cannot describe how big this is for our campaign to be next Secretary of State in Arizona.**

[And this is where you come in.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c5fa95f1fc&e=44b8c466b0)

_No matter how many endorsements we get from proud America first Patriots who are joining our case, at the end of the day it is your support that matters._

**We are up against a wall. Every day it becomes harder to get the word out about election integrity as the main stream media REFUSES to cover the good work that we are doing in Maricopa County.**

_We are preparing for more legal attacks from the Department of Justice’s Merrick Garland and others, who have been targeting us because they are scared of the work that we have done._

**Right now, we have the Democrats in a corner, and they are scared, and they will fight back.**

_[And this is why I need your support today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d29f4a7688&e=44b8c466b0). We need to build a war chest to fight back against the ongoing and inevitable attacks by the mainstream media, the Department of Justice, and phony Radical Leftist Legal groups._

_[Please support my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona today. We are bolstering our defenses and building our war chest, and our campaign desperately needs your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b61cf3cfcb&e=44b8c466b0)_

_[*Make a Statement with Dr. Paul Gosar*](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7702c5d1e1&e=44b8c466b0)_

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America-First Arizonan, former paramedic, policeman, and first responder, and proud member of the business community.

**I have directed my life-long passion to helping others to helping Americans protect the soul of their Constitution – Election Integrity.**

This is personal to me. We all know that President Trump should STILL be President.

_Instead, we have a demented President incapable of leading the Union, and now American blood is on Afghanistan soil._

**All America First Patriots need to join together. [_Join me, President Trump, Bernard Kerik, and Dr. Paul Gosar with a donation today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9ffcf09007&e=44b8c466b0)**
[_Please donate TODAY to make a stand against the Democrats, and stand up for our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1d7d340b55&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=93c489f013&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=44dbaf7cfd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8c5d480e83) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8c5d480e83).

name: Chuck Rocha, Nuestro PAC
subject: Voters are losing their rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
Texas passed a new law restricting voting rights yesterday.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35434973/305056081/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMDg3YWJlLWU3MTAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lk_p91fIlQ9rW-DnWHnvjGiB6KJmLEkEDYYY0M2a79k=)

Friend -
Texas Republicans are playing a dangerous game by [signing SB1 into law](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35434974/305056082/-1123798642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMDg3YWJlLWU3MTAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lk_p91fIlQ9rW-DnWHnvjGiB6KJmLEkEDYYY0M2a79k=&emci=525e0b02-b110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=cc087abe-e710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7684583) yesterday. This will suppress voting rights by:
* Making it more difficult for people with disabilities to vote
* Prohibiting drive-through and 24-hour voting
* Placing limits on mail voting

Last week, they also passed [an anti-abortion law](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35434975/305056083/739697393?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMDg3YWJlLWU3MTAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lk_p91fIlQ9rW-DnWHnvjGiB6KJmLEkEDYYY0M2a79k=&emci=525e0b02-b110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=cc087abe-e710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7684583) that restricts people's right to choose what to do with their own bodies.
This isn't just a problem in Texas, though. At least 18 other states have enacted new voting restrictions since 2020, including Florida, Georgia and Arizona. Almost all of these new laws disproportionately affect voters of color and their ability to cast their ballots.
We have to stop them.
**[Chip in whatever you can so Nuestro PAC can help Texans, and everyone at risk of losing their rights, fight back.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35434976/305056084/376838283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMDg3YWJlLWU3MTAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lk_p91fIlQ9rW-DnWHnvjGiB6KJmLEkEDYYY0M2a79k=)**
This isn't going to be easy, but together, we can win.
Thanks for your support.
Chuck Rocha, Nuestro PAC
[**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35434977/305056085/376838283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMDg3YWJlLWU3MTAtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lk_p91fIlQ9rW-DnWHnvjGiB6KJmLEkEDYYY0M2a79k=)

name: re: the Supreme Court [Left Action]
subject: Expand the Court
body:
Right-wing Republicans stole the court, and now it's time to take it back and restore fairness
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [Expand the Supreme Court! Take it Back from Right-Wing Extremists!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba0ed08e-b104-4d85-8c90-f2aaf45d518f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a1c75a1-35c6-4e89-a405-6bb7b1e2ad6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Look, after Republicans stole the seat from Merrick Garland, Donald Trump STACKED the Supreme Court with anti-choice, anti-democracy bigots. And just last week, they proved how awful they are by allowing a clearly unconstitutional abortion ban in Texas to stand! [**If we’re going to strike this awful ban down, we NEED to expand the Supreme Court, and restore balance and the rule of law**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadadca0c-e00f-48bb-a38f-455ef97620d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And Congress can do this right now, without any Republican votes. The stakes have never been higher. [Sign now to show you support expanding the Supreme Court → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta67a9dc8-c793-4d77-9838-5cf68f31cfb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
| | Peter, did you see this? **A new poll has us down by SEVEN POINTS against a Republican opponent.** I'll be honest, this isn't what we hoped to see. The GOP attack ads clearly are working and I need your help to fight back as quickly as we can. If we lose this seat, we're going to lose the House majority and stop all the progress we've been making for our communities and families. [**Can you please rush in a donation to our rapid response fund right now so we can double down on reaching voters and keep CA-10 blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3TOibPxFO5AVeVldK81ujQQuPb85KxNzfgoOVQ_YuA=/119oCNffp_hAOBGnY3x7hLJxpD5nexyBdPZ5Z1ntPLo=?refcode=E11184-20210908-NewPoll2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Thanks for your support, I know we can do this.
Josh

body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo6ehgpk7f4nijusfff8l4d3us7lcnov85elm2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4chj62o76cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zobpo0au3p0b6a8s73un7uahipsg250h1f4jebkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4chj62o76cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z30oc3he1u337f6maqi4feeioa4fhu6ib5rej8so_rp22sh2s8i66pj4chj62o76cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: FWD: The Trump family and members of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend: I wanted to make sure you didn't miss my earlier message (below) about the investigation into the Trump family's and congressional Republicans' involvement in the Capitol insurrection.
---
Each day as the House presses forward with investigations, we are learning more disturbing information about Donald Trump weaponizing the executive branch to try to overthrow the election. Now, the bipartisan Jan. 6 Commission may uncover that congressional Republicans and Trump family members directly aided the rioters as they attacked the Capitol and our democracy.
But here's what we're up against: Trump's right-wing allies will do everything in their power to obstruct investigations and brush the former president and GOP's anti-democratic antics under the rug. **That 's why we must take action together to hold every public official accountable for attacking our democracy. Before 11:59 p.m. tonight, I need 275 more people to speak out and tell me where they stand:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if proven that they aided the January 6th insurrectionists?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1069-su-nd)**
Thanks so much for speaking out.
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Sep 4, 2021
Subject: The Trump family and members of Congress

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zEgDfmQO3VeyWaiTAv3AInhY6ASP3V%2Fk&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
They are serious and we need them to be: The bipartisan select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection has asked telecommunication companies to preserve records of members of Congress and the Trump family who participated in the "Stop the Steal" rally - otherwise known as the precursor to the attack on the Capitol.
**In other words, we are about to learn whether members of Congress and the Trump family aided the violent insurrectionists the day of the Capitol attack.**
According to CNN, the committee may investigate the communications of elected officials such as Reps. Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Jim Jordan. They will also reportedly investigate the former president and his children.
This comes just weeks after I heard closed-door testimony from former AG Jeff Rosen -- who offered chilling confirmation that Donald Trump mounted a brutal pressure campaign aimed at the Department of Justice, seeking to weaponize the DOJ to overturn the 2020 election.
Here's what I can tell you as a former U.S. Attorney and a state attorney general for over 20 years: Based on that testimony alone, there is real potential for criminal charges to be considered against the former president. All the facts must be gathered, and all options must be considered.
**But Republicans will do whatever they can to protect themselves and cover for Donald Trump and his family. They are already making threats to try to keep the facts from coming out. It 's up to all grassroots Democrats to speak out and ensure Trump is held accountable - which is why I need to know where 1,000 of you stand right now:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if proven that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1069-su-nd)**
It's becoming clearer and clearer that the former president and his acolytes mounted an unprecedented and coordinated attack on our democratic institutions. The damages they inflicted - and attempted to inflict - are some of the gravest in modern times. It's incumbent upon all of us to speak out. I appreciate you speaking out alongside me.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xRgbzJw0sSQvbBR%2FiERjzatjQ7KahTqq&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: This shouldn’t be controversial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Here's something that shouldn't be controversial: I believe we need to protect the right to vote and defend reproductive rights. And we cannot let the filibuster stand in our way. It’s time to get rid of it, but if it came up for a vote tomorrow, it would fail.

[**That’s why we need to expand our 50/50 Senate majority to end the filibuster and make progress on the issues that matter most to working families. Please chip in $3 to help us defeat Ron Johnson and get this done. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35436898/305062569/-623328154?gpsid=31_130_20376&refcode=em21_210908_filibuster_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_&utm_campaign=em21_210908_filibuster_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRhMDEwOC1lZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKg4OPaj3rifxqGmiubGmrV36dC92qM9fWdRFK4qUy8=)

Look, the American people didn’t send Democrats to Washington just so they could hand the keys back to Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson. It’s time to stop playing defense and go on offense.

The longer Senate Democrats delay ending the filibuster, the more time Republican legislatures have to restrict the right to vote and the right to a safe, legal abortion -- and the more time Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson have to stall the passage of federal legislation that would stop these right-wing attacks.

What we’re seeing happen in Texas right now will happen across the country unless we have the courage to fight back. It’s that simple. We have to act. But abolishing the filibuster won’t be easy with a 50/50 majority.

**We cannot expand our Democratic Senate majority without flipping Wisconsin blue, which is why I’m asking you to add a donation of $3 to help us defeat Ron Johnson and replace him with someone who will actually get rid of the filibuster. clean_body: Here's something that shouldn't be controversial: I believe we need to protect the right to vote and defend reproductive rights. And we cannot let the filibuster stand in our way. It’s time to get rid of it, but if it came up for a vote tomorrow, it would fail. = Look, the American people didn’t send Democrats to Washington just so they could hand the keys back to Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson. It’s time to stop playing defense and go on offense. The longer Senate Democrats delay ending the filibuster, the more time Republican legislatures have to restrict the right to vote and the right to a safe, legal abortion -- and the more time Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson have to stall the passage of federal legislation that would stop these right-wing attacks. What we’re seeing happen in Texas right now will happen across the country unless we have the courage to fight back. It’s that simple. We have to act. But abolishing the filibuster won’t be easy with a 50/50 majority. We cannot expand our Democratic Senate majority without flipping Wisconsin blue, which is why I’m asking you to add a donation of $3 to help us defeat Ron Johnson and replace him with someone who will actually get rid of the filibuster. [**Will you help us in the fight against the Indiana Republican strategy to manipulate the systems by starting a monthly contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437946/305066743/624230061?refcode=FR.09.08.21.&FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=) **Here's the rundown:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437947/305066754/624230061?refcode=FR.09.08.21.&FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=) | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437948/305066761/624230061?refcode=FR.09.08.21.&FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=)
**Why should you care about redistricting?**

Redistricting affects everything. Look at the facts: A [recent study](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437950/305066762/-4736632?FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=&emci=c634a737-dd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fb77d9b9-f010-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) found that Indiana's legislative maps are [95% more biased](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437957/305066768/38357101?FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=&emci=c634a737-dd10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fb77d9b9-f010-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) toward one party than compared to the rest of the country. The process is geared more toward helping self-serving politicians than helping everyday families. With the INGOP having the supermajority in the statehouse, they will draw their own district lines and pick their voters to protect incumbent Indiana Republicans and their candidates. Doing this takes away the power of our vote and hands it over to the INGOP.

It's long past time for balance to return to local, state, and federal offices, and that's why we want you to **SAVE THE DATE**. Democrats and Hoosiers know Indiana is at its strongest when there are two strong political parties because that's when the right solution - not a partisan one - solves today's problems facing their families.

For the last 10 years, Indiana Republicans created a "work more for less" economy, underfunded the state's public schools, and promoted unnecessary culture wars that divided families and communities in all 92 counties. All of this falls squarely on the Indiana Republican Party. They created this reality through redistricting in 2011 and we are left with a broken system today.

We cannot allow the INGOP to continue taking the power away from you, the voter. Indiana Republicans are on notice that their time of extreme partisanship and misinformation needs to come to an end. [**A contribution of $10 could help us increase the pressure on Indiana Republicans to do more to fight gerrymandering this month.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35437960/305066775/624230061?refcode=FR.09.08.21.&amount=10&FR.09.08.21.=FR.09.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc3ZDliOS1mMDEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js6Cj2l4QUyNIZa63QWTv2wFYYBXZ5JInv0bfUOK0GI=)

Peter, this isn’t your normal political advertisement ‐‐ it’s my personal story.

And in my conversations with Virginians from Roanoke to Richmond, **I know my story is a Virginia story.**

When I was pregnant with my son, I worked at a gas station during the night shift on minimum wage just to make ends meet.

When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved both of our lives.

**I know this story resonates because it is the story of so many of us.**

[**These issues are personal to me, and I am proud to be fighting for these same issues every day. But I can’t do this alone ‐‐ will you contribute $3 to keep our important ads running? Election Day is just around the corner, and every dollar counts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35438753/305069280/-196326674?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20210908_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2FjNzVlYi1mMjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fku_Hsrpl5Uq_pOc7g-fHf6ELAzdLpXsZv_UE13QX4g=)

clean_body: I know my story is a Virginia story. | = Peter, earlier this week my campaign’s first ad of the general election went live! You can watch it here: = This is a huge step in this campaign ‐‐ keeping our ads alive is critical for getting my message out to voters across the Commonwealth. = | = Peter, this isn’t your normal political advertisement ‐‐ it’s my personal story. And in my conversations with Virginians from Roanoke to Richmond, I know my story is a Virginia story. When I was pregnant with my son, I worked at a gas station during the night shift on minimum wage just to make ends meet. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved both of our lives. I know this story resonates because it is the story of so many of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Look Derek, this election is coming up — sooner than you realize.
And frankly, **_we’re in danger of losing up and down the ballot._**
Glenn Youngkin is a GOP extremist who is funding his campaign with $75 million of his own personal fortune.
He’s promised to defund Planned Parenthood, he _opposes_ Medicaid expansion, he’s _anti_ -LGBTQ+ and has no interest in sensible gun legislation.

name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c323%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vKRUfzXgvv6jzlhKZndTwA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65418%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FYbkij9DrvjqrDCXpY%2bE2Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65418%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FYbkij9DrvjqrDCXpY%2bE2Q&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65419%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gkx4oG9Lzvum8eAfLqvUtw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c323%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vKRUfzXgvv6jzlhKZndTwA&sysid=1)_

name: Donna Imam
subject: This is now a crime in Texas.
body:
Texas just made it a crime for a public official to send a vote by mail application. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35439898/305072116/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgwNmQyYi1mNzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSAAR8NR7wKp0npPaldMEPK_NA7EIZuRVjNtBVasFRE=)
**Gov. Greg Abbott signs voting bill into law**
_\- The Texas Tribune_
* * *

Friend,

**Yesterday, Governor Abbott signed SB 1 -- the GOP's voter suppression bill -- into law.** Here's how egregious some of items in the bill are: **• Mail ballots can be easily invalidated due to simple unintended mistakes:** if the ID number used between the ballot, the envelope, and the vote-by-mail application (sometimes submitted months earlier) don't match or if the signature doesn't match what's on file.

**• Monthly citizenship checks, aimed at removing registered voters:** In 2019, Texas state officials wasted hundreds of thousands of dollars in an attempt to remove 100,000 registered voters by questioning their citizenship status (knowing that naturalized citizens would be affected). Even though they later acknowledged this attempt at discriminatory voter purge, this practice is now legal under SB 1.

**• Emboldens poll watchers by making it a crime to deny them access:** Poll watchers must be allowed to have 'free movement' to observe and listen without obstruction to all election activity.

**• Places barriers to helping others:** People who help others vote (an elderly neighbor for example), have to now sign an oath _under penalty of perjury_ and fill out documentation identifying who they are, and their relationship to the voter just to be able to help others. The bill also bans drive through voting and 24 hour access to the polls and **makes it a crime for a public official to send an application to vote by mail to somebody who did not request it -- even if they are eligible.**

The GOP is doing everything they can to make Texas the hardest state to vote in. We're not going to stand for it. We're going to fight it the best way we know how -- by going door-to-door and ensuring Texans are informed and overcome these hurdles to get to the ballot box.

In the interim we can support federal voting rights legislation like H.R. 1 -- the For the People Act.

[**Today, I'm asking if you'll add your name next to mine so we can get 1,000 people to voice their support. Will you sign my petition in support of the For the People Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35439899/305072117/617498431?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgwNmQyYi1mNzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSAAR8NR7wKp0npPaldMEPK_NA7EIZuRVjNtBVasFRE=&emci=41806d2b-f710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=46806d2b-f710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7168977)

The For The People Act -- which has already passed in the House -- establishes same-day voter registration, expands mail-in voting, makes election day a national holiday, ends partisan gerrymandering, and reforms campaign finance.

[**Please sign on today >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35439901/305072119/617498431?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgwNmQyYi1mNzEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSAAR8NR7wKp0npPaldMEPK_NA7EIZuRVjNtBVasFRE=&emci=41806d2b-f710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=46806d2b-f710-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7168977)

clean_body: Texas just made it a crime for a public official to send a vote by mail application. | = Gov. Greg Abbott signs voting bill into law \- The Texas Tribune Friend, Yesterday, Governor Abbott signed SB 1 -- the GOP's voter suppression bill -- into law. Here's how egregious some of items in the bill are: • Mail ballots can be easily invalidated due to simple unintended mistakes: if the ID number used between the ballot, the envelope, and the vote-by-mail application (sometimes submitted months earlier) don't match or if the signature doesn't match what's on file. • Monthly citizenship checks, aimed at removing registered voters: In 2019, Texas state officials wasted hundreds of thousands of dollars in an attempt to remove 100,000 registered voters by questioning their citizenship status (knowing that naturalized citizens would be affected). Even though they later acknowledged this attempt at discriminatory voter purge, this practice is now legal under SB 1. • Emboldens poll watchers by making it a crime to deny them access: Poll watchers must be allowed to have 'free movement' to observe and listen without obstruction to all election activity. • Places barriers to helping others: People who help others vote (an elderly neighbor for example), have to now sign an oath under penalty of perjury and fill out documentation identifying who they are, and their relationship to the voter just to be able to help others. The bill also bans drive through voting and 24 hour access to the polls and makes it a crime for a public official to send an application to vote by mail to somebody who did not request it -- even if they are eligible. The GOP is doing everything they can to make Texas the hardest state to vote in. We're not going to stand for it. We're going to fight it the best way we know how -- by going door-to-door and ensuring Texans are informed and overcome these hurdles to get to the ballot box. In the interim we can support federal voting rights legislation like H.R. 1 -- the For the People Act. | The For The People Act -- which has already passed in the House -- establishes same-day voter registration, expands mail-in voting, makes election day a national holiday, ends partisan gerrymandering, and reforms campaign finance. Thanks, Donna =** | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. Right now, Austin is represented by five extreme right GOP members due to gerrymandering. In 2022, Texas will gain two new congressional districts and this is our best chance to change that. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

subject: We need to act on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Are you in?

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35440166/305073556/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyNDM4Mi1mODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onLHxUrmPyPHpRonhszK9c4688iuPfp8D3a98UqKcZ0=)

| | **Team, July was the hottest month ever recorded in human history.** If the intense heat isn’t quite doing it for you, take a look at the climate crisis through a different lens. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35440171/305073560/756290664?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyNDM4Mi1mODEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onLHxUrmPyPHpRonhszK9c4688iuPfp8D3a98UqKcZ0=&emci=317a9a4d-af10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b6824382-f810-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957) You read that right, folks. **This will be the coldest summer of the rest of our lives.** That said, it’s not too late to act to slow the effects of climate change. We can avoid the worst-case climate effects if we use our voices to demand that Congress acts on climate. Like Susie, we know that our state simply cannot afford that.

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: Days away from recall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
We are now in our FINAL WEEK of the recall against Gavin Newsom. Voting by mail has been going on for over 3 weeks now, and we're approaching the finish line. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286985:JUB3kr2NB:m:1:3253819041:01BB6503B20F00387031D47101022F2D:r)

---
We are now in our FINAL WEEK of the recall against Gavin Newsom. Voting by mail has been going on for over 3 weeks now, and we're approaching the finish line.

When the recall against Newsom began over a year ago, the corporate media and radical Left wrote us off. Now, **we 're just days away from finally holding Newsom accountable** for his overreaching control, his hypocrisy, and his countless failures.

**This final week is the most critical of the whole recall effort.** We're pushing to secure every last ballot in support of the recall that we can, so can pull off a historic defeat of the leftist establishment that has destroyed California.

We need your help to keep our voter outreach operations fully funded so we can secure the votes we need to finish the job of recalling Newsom.

[**Will you stick with us through this FINAL WEEK and help secure the victory we 've been working toward for over a year with a critical contribution of $10, $25, $50 or $100 or more to Larry Elder's ballot committee?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286985:JUB3kr2NB:m:1:3253819041:01BB6503B20F00387031D47101022F2D:r)

We're coming up fast on the finish line, and the ONLY way we're going to win is if we don't take our foot off the gas. [**Please send in your critical continued support to help us pull this off and recall Gavin Newsom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286985:JUB3kr2NB:m:1:3253819041:01BB6503B20F00387031D47101022F2D:r)

Thanks,

Lou Barnett, Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**HELP US RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58286985:JUB3kr2NB:m:1:3253819041:01BB6503B20F00387031D47101022F2D:r)

name: Sheriff Joe
subject: Joe Biden’s America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WE WANT TRUMP
body:
America wants Donald Trump to be our President in 2024. Let’s make sure that happens. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f209a318b8b040d185977946996a0eb0&_e=sYnYXJG3WkRkm1ui2_ZQZQ2JQjZ89pdZZG5IlTrgBIovbYWlmTVoachcvNx1jC4qPouC1H08dD2uXD0tC_vvmhfAEWB0qarJXzj3unMdI25dBKcTxHyBeYhQhgdL5zLm1mHTcKS11YpFc9vsOk4FK1hcXPDEaZeRSCB0swStkRqFnEXt-nTuneeN6jOGqvAsCGl-0-v0O9gwJD4trgZi45ra4cdh1KFyrndPOod_jNx1dzmkHuU7BXV4DQzwJ92JpOCi47jkfginpdffmIB6D2a4OfSHmCr_BFX0Z8t6AuvO8phcytLXIpvINdrE7r_ScRayk1h17MWnzvcQ6-ItEPmjkgBQ5mNEFIEO00oZZyrq4jEKMZup6fhZq0EjkNbSn_XCqVcFu7okT2lBjLy9G0d4PmNm162oqYTQCPLoVyhD5G02fK7LTS-zpqxbukiE)

---
Peter,

Failed economic policies, skyrocketing crime rates, out-of-control inflation, and a federal government that allows thousands of illegal immigrants with COVID-19 to pour across our borders _**every single DAY.**_

**THAT IS JOE BIDEN’S AMERICA.**
Last year we saw short-sighted people who voted for Biden just because he wasn’t “mean” or brutally honest like Trump, and they got a career politician who blames others. They are regretting their choice, and **they want Trump back as President in 2024.**

**I’ve been called "America's Toughest Sheriff" and that’s why I’m leading the** _**We Want Trump PAC**_ **because we can’t allow crime, corruption, and lazy politicians to ruin our nation.**

I’m a Korean War veteran. I spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director of DEA at home and abroad to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona. When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games - and neither does Donald Trump. body:
this is not good

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35443153/305091455/-2023814932?refcode=20210908.6_GR_9AX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ1OWYxNC0wNTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gM9GrwJcM82E9pnpV_j6efcDZdUFis91JjqBIHoA47E=)

| | Derek, we might have to pull our ads from the air.

For the first two months of this race, Glenn Youngkin was dramatically outspending us on TV. Now, Terry is _finally_ on the air with some ads of his own, but with polling tied, we need to be more aggressive to stop Youngkin from pulling ahead.

**And what’s worse, we’re hitting an end-of-summer fundraising slump, and funding for the ads program is starting to dry up right before the start of early voting.**

name: John Fetterman
subject: Joe Manchin and I disagree on this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Now is not the time to "hit the pause button." Now is the time to take action and rebuild. Period.
#
Peter, this is infuriating.
Senator Joe Manchin has now suggested that Democrats in the Senate "hit the pause button" on President Biden's plan to make a historic and urgently needed investment in our nation's infrastructure.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210908-2569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)
HOW could a sitting Senator say we need to hit pause on infrastructure in the wake of severe and deadly floods and destruction across Pennsylvania, the Northeast, and the South. Hurricane Ida has once again laid bare the fact that our current infrastructure is outdated and neglected. And it won't stand a fighting chance against the climate emergency that becomes more dire by the day.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210908-2569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)
_Recent extreme flooding in Philadelphia, PA_
_Respectfully — now is not the time to "hit the pause button."_ Now is the time to take action and rebuild. Period.
By now, I've made it pretty clear what I think about Democrats who choose to needlessly stand in the way of the bold progress that working people across the country voted for.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country.
**Peter, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in my campaign.**
[**_Our campaign is the most reliant on the grassroots of ANY in this PA Senate race, so I mean it when I tell you I am relying on your support today. Will you chip in your first $5 or more to support our grassroots campaign to flip this seat blue and add that 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210908-2569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210908-2569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)**
Democrats need to vote like Democrats. We have the House, we have the Senate, we have the White House – so let's act like it and finally deliver real results for working people.
Thank you for having my back, Peter.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The last thing Pennsylvania needs is a senator has had to "evolve" on issues. We don't need a senator who will ever be praised by Mitch McConnell. And we _definitely don't_ need a senator who will stand in the way of transformative legislation that helps working people. [** _If you're with me, please donate $5 to support our people-powered campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210908-2569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210908-2569-footer-test-ctrl&t=28&refcode2=2569_434096_FJUomN&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=29&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2569%2E434096%2EFJUomN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I don’t know about you but it's become abundantly clear that Joe Biden is no longer capable of being Commander in Chief. Despite the media’s constant defense of Biden, the American people can see right through it.

clean_body: I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a long time, and I can tell you one thing with absolute certainty: He is THE trusted conservative Kansans need in the Gov Friend, I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a long time, and I can tell you one thing with absolute certainty: He is THE trusted conservative Kansans need in the Governor's Office. Today, I am announcing my full endorsement of his campaign to lead Kansas. And I have an important task for you too. We need every Kansas conservative to step up and show their support for not only Derek’s campaign... But for our conservative values. When you look at his record as Attorney General, you see a leader who has always fought for the most vulnerable and always stood up to do the right thing. As governor, he’ll continue to look out for Kansas families and businesses. He’ll continue to fight hard against federal government intrusion into our state. He’ll continue to defend our conservative values for years to come. I am proud to be on Team Schmidt, and I am so excited for you to join us. I hope you’ll step up and show your support today. Derek is our state’s best shot! –Mike Pompeo | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: We need answers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We must raise our collective voice to demand that top fossil fuel executives testify in front of Congress about their shady lobbying practices, lies, and deceit.
#
We need answers.
For decades, Big Oil CEOs and fossil fuel companies knew about the threat of the climate crisis.
Yet, for nearly FORTY years, these companies spent millions of dollars to spread doubt and misinformation about the dangers of fossil fuels to protect their profits — robbing a generation’s worth of time to transition our economy onto renewable energy!
**Fossil fuel companies knew that their decisions were fueling the climate crisis, and they ignored the science and lied to the public.**[**_That’s why Erica just signed on as a citizen co-sponsor in support of Rep. Ro Khanna and 350.org’s call demanding that top fossil fuel executives testify in front of Congress. Will you join us?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13819?t=1&akid=424%2E3698%2EPSnMRU)
**[Sign Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13819?t=2&akid=424%2E3698%2EPSnMRU)**
The climate crisis is ALREADY here, and it’s claiming lives and livelihoods right now!
In North Carolina alone, we’ve seen deadly flooding in our coastal communities, ruined crops, extreme weather, and scorching heat. But the world’s most powerful fossil fuel companies continue to escape Congressional oversight for their role in fueling this climate emergency.
We must raise our collective voice to demand that top fossil fuel executives testify in front of Congress about their shady lobbying practices, lies, and deceit.
[**Will you please add your name next to Erica’s to co-sponsor the call to hold Big Oil executives accountable, then make a donation to our campaign to send Erica to the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13819?t=3&akid=424%2E3698%2EPSnMRU) Erica is the ONLY candidate in this race who has pledged never to accept campaign contributions from fossil fuel companies.
**[Sign Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13819?t=4&akid=424%2E3698%2EPSnMRU)**
Thanks for taking action,
Team Erica Smith

subject: ALERT: Greg Abbott’s outrageous comments on the Texas abortion ban
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
As Senator Murray said yesterday, if you have to lie this badly to try to make your anti-abortion law sound less scary and dystopian, you should be repealing the law -- not defending it.
#
Did you see the news yesterday, Peter?
Texas Republican Governor Greg Abbott made some outrageous comments about the extreme anti-abortion ban just enacted in his state. When asked by a reporter why a woman who is raped should be forced to carry a pregnancy to term. **_He said Texas will “eliminate rape.”_**
As Senator Murray said yesterday, if you have to lie this badly to try to make your anti-abortion law sound less scary and dystopian, you should be repealing the law -- not defending it.
With Republicans ramping up their attacks on reproductive rights and the Supreme Court refusing to uphold the precedent set by Roe v. Wade, we absolutely cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate. We need to defend -- and expand -- it in 2022.
**[Peter, will you donate $5 now to stand with Patty Murray and the Democratic Senate majority? We can only defeat the GOP with your grassroots support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35444732/305107169/-26583618?refcode=pm_em_210908_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJkM2IyOS0xMDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5jF_61OEoS3HLLRwnPi2AY8xTugXi_EavyWffRj_cE=)**

We only have a 50-50 Senate, which is why we absolutely can’t afford to give an inch. We need to reelect every single Democratic Senator on the ballot in 2022.

A new poll shows Independents now favor Republicans to take back the House by 1 POINT \-- that’s a 15-point swing in our favor since April! With just 5 SEATS needed to flip the House, this is exactly the advantage we were looking for as our campaign prepares to close out our FIRST FEC quarter. Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. name: Dick Durbin
subject: It’s our job to help people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Instead of working to encourage vaccines and invest in our public health infrastructure, some Republican politicians are choosing to focus on petty politics instead.
#
Peter,
The COVID-19 pandemic is still with us.
New cases pop up every day, and many families and small businesses are struggling.
But instead of working to encourage vaccines and invest in our public health infrastructure, some Republican politicians are choosing to focus on petty politics instead.
Republican governors like Ron DeSantis and Greg Abbott are playing games and risking lives.
**As elected officials, it’s our job to help people. Saving lives shouldn’t be a political issue.**
I’ve been working with Senate Democrats to make sure we are doing everything we possibly can to help people in Illinois and across the country come back stronger from this crisis.
But Mitch McConnell and the Republicans are hard at work trying to take the Senate back -- and advance the dangerous, anti-science GOP agenda. We can’t let that happen, Peter.
**[Will you donate $5 or anything you can now and help defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35445201/305107975/869433177?refcode=dd_em_210908_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWIyZDMyMy0xMzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvwlHPqcEmuYSEqzCC77iVsJfg8C6AUon7aEPm_qmds=)**

clean_body: Instead of working to encourage vaccines and invest in our public health infrastructure, some Republican politicians are choosing to focus on petty politics instead. Peter, The COVID-19 pandemic is still with us. New cases pop up every day, and many families and small businesses are struggling. But instead of working to encourage vaccines and invest in our public health infrastructure, some Republican politicians are choosing to focus on petty politics instead. Republican governors like Ron DeSantis and Greg Abbott are playing games and risking lives. As elected officials, it’s our job to help people. Saving lives shouldn’t be a political issue. I’ve been working with Senate Democrats to make sure we are doing everything we possibly can to help people in Illinois and across the country come back stronger from this crisis. But Mitch McConnell and the Republicans are hard at work trying to take the Senate back -- and advance the dangerous, anti-science GOP agenda. We can’t let that happen, Peter. = My best, Dick Durbin = * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What part of the spending package does Joe Manchin want Democrats to put “a pause” on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, here we go again.
Late last week, West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin remarked in an op-ed that Democrats should take a “strategic pause” in moving a transformative spending bill forward.
On MSNBC this weekend, Pramila asked Senator Manchin what exactly he would like Democrats to pause on:
> _I would just ask Senator Manchin, what does he intend to put a pause on? Does he intend to put a pause on our immediate necessity to fight climate change? Or perhaps he wants to pause on giving childcare to women so they can get back into the economy? Does he want to pause on health care right at the moment when the Delta variant is spiking? How about housing? Does he want to pause on getting affordable housing to people across the country?_
From the beginning, we’ve been clear: **Congress needs to deliver for the people! That’s why voters delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House — it’s long overdue that we move our agenda forward.**
[**Pramila’s leadership is more important than ever — and we won’t stop growing our movement for real change until we pass a bold jobs and families plan. Can you contribute $3 or more right now to support Pramila in this fight to deliver for the people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210908?refcode=em20210908-615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=615_420207_X1Vc33&akid=615%2E420207%2EX1Vc33)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210908?refcode=em20210908-615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=615_420207_X1Vc33&akid=615%2E420207%2EX1Vc33)**
We have some BIG obstacles in our way, but we can get this critical work done if we do so together.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210908-615-footer&t=22&refcode2=615_420207_X1Vc33&akid=615%2E420207%2EX1Vc33)**
---

subject: I’m asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn4vxy-M4fOuSX8SUcPJE0I5oele35Hx75tuGRZ5-TSLQqrHvivk9KkHILK8VG0_pMfRYj8jfwtMF7i6JxHz5Qn9uSkSjtvreHHmVKxwWl2odS70kalXcY7cXOpng6c9QXO_Vm9nvEpvTTilyio3w7a0j_kWPrrymAAiE9_MuMN4gKUBMjqT2KkOS9JEeq14d2wAOo3x2FCNw6EsGT778GON)

---
Peter,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn45yQL9JJEeWnRavBZ7JLyrAFXyXxr8zBewS0-JqzpG3ejfivwG5Oxor5u3Xr1jDre_Fj8IwlS_xgwmwwdWQtI6gaSq8JqnC1DkVe_6wOYiQ7rwowqN5W-PcSaQaZaF1Ywg1bzjauco0V3vaJ9RuJRIRfiIvHQKne__HX0bCkanB-9i_llQxD7uDUjZmCNIzKtaSArM0ljzAWcMjQoNiNZo)**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn5zmVj54rqE64gOcvvaEwVVAsSzRGFf6vVmHdIdEtqmWMRvp1Gj3lP4NLQ91gh9A5KYBY6RDIYW7q8ZBZGzpD-nJhYIVALkO7q_CNak6hi4w3PoVDfN5s3g8QcoduGHfNv_ZDDrY0Ep-5xcM5RV5IYVLucAo9Nh4d08tkOvYuImZo3S4JWhAApwGLYQKFuSPrQ-uqG-bxbIkitsiVrvlNrh)
President Trump is right: **I will never let you down.** I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure EVERY AMERICAN - regardless of income level, race, or religion, has the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority and are already raising massive sums of money in an attempt to blunt my campaign before we really get rolling. **[This is why it's crucial that you join Team Herschel today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn7k-d0W5_nBVP8V1sDfor56ar5SMsu_Ba19C5LhU-t0El5d4pUDeKn31DF3hcV3ZfgBzdL-wwKGQG8jZRZQAB7RpXPR9prwIjuro6-1qtV-cpaE2omuljD1-YIF0PZlgMEYIjORIQ7_40utsX5xDmZyOqY7NpXjZ8QCpVRiLzcISS0uCY78KbNRtiDgwPauDNMmOUoRM3rKF98CAV3j0rP6)**

The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington. I've chosen not to sit on the sidelines and watch President Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Raphael Warnock wreck our great country. **[You have to make a choice to not sit on the sidelines, either.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn5r0dVm2pS5iu2Atoak17jBqud-X3h2Zl5jM_RfWN0SmOfSgGU-L-45bulpEwh0Hgkvdvghrfod7J8riF0jw4_OOoTWuAE4cZMWvM89FubcKVJT33AujYnqRY8ej0gSQWS23ibzwyDU_Q5H0GincLWhBnVunIkq5whYfp0hF2fkcOoGt-gPt9Vy-O3UJdAuedK8PuZ4t3RSNUuShpi7ubPO)** The stakes are too high.

**[Your endorsement today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn4iJaxRy-jSVGdhzTkQDsOnL-PD5na3YV0NBNSofwL8P4EPTWALtd8vP_GAkm6U7QmfVUmnAU2dZ-E8anRRkWEZeqFmryyfEg83Y5mEoC5kTndzC0rFF-zezNn5k4AEUqWpsM3KkBOlXBhbolZUcYfmdMecoHGPNansxrjhd_If2cAUtHpogKs1EMEbygLkNjfR9yPDKJqNUgD-nwV4_XHi)** will benefit my campaign immediately and serve me and my team well as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington, DC.

Thank you very much,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cc7d303f13e34b0f814d2484e9aeaa8d&_e=s-BlH6s6cp5OpLK2nLryFaeEAj5LOrjUThvcxdRGsr_zSASeXK5GAYPhZ0TvGkNUSqQL-0C0VUNj9OsVvH1rnPdWod8x_2iwoiZkDWLftyvotgvTZ5dg46g4EErb2jElk5mkbXyN_C9oHcRss62Czk_aBRxfM8BL6o4FjZqYRaYtd-XiKaLyknG9BeT6JDXjs1N3Egw-ZgtcdSjtdBSqmGVezFh9235cQlQiyAjoaOEnebo0TcihLqmoREtG0P_nw-RZi1-esnGMPIJ6r842udXAdyxRVsZ8VNwUt9YotloCFCvq29kOtd1vQwOqby16EqSJeX35-ZkJYC4XEjo5V8ZE-v2yUJjry_Qm0eg3pn6ykGgGMxOIMWmjweMmpKB8SG3PAo25TIRMCBC8pvqZ7vI8SG-CoW3hR1nMoZlMbuSrmEYZIBFY9lbbQuCBdbw4LxwUoKeR2V8BAL5D0kmkvVYVJbVEV3ALg0Plw8GBbRwBdv0-R6sHHRlbuOZyzF_VKa4l1dDDD7hCaCDrUqwAdxl-BbH_Ed-W_aTJYVgTLbVUOBPNz5Xto-gKCYmlJRAg)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate
