I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. President Trump is right: I will never let you down. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure EVERY AMERICAN - regardless of income level, race, or religion, has the opportunity to pursue their dreams. Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority and are already raising massive sums of money in an attempt to blunt my campaign before we really get rolling. The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington. I've chosen not to sit on the sidelines and watch President Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Raphael Warnock wreck our great country. The stakes are too high. will benefit my campaign immediately and serve me and my team well as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington, DC. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

body:
Congresswoman Michelle Steel (R-Orange County) has announced her support for Nathan Hochman in the 2022 race for California Attorney General. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite.com/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428070?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite.com/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428070?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite.com/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428070?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite.com/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428070?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite.com/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428070?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
September 8, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Congresswoman Michelle Steel Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Congresswoman Michelle Steel, who represents Coastal Orange County in Congress, has announced her support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing her endorsement, Congresswoman Steel stated: _“With crime on the rise in California, it is critical that we elect a qualified, competent Attorney General in 2022. As a prosecutor and nationwide leader in the legal community, Nathan Hochman has a long track record of effectively fighting for California families. He has my full confidence to the be next Attorney General of California."_

In response to the news, Hochman stated _"I am honored to have Congresswoman Michelle Steel join our growing campaign to restore public safety for California."_

Nathan Hochman is an experienced prosecutor, lawyer, and civic leader. After graduating from Brown University and earning his law degree from Stanford Law School, Hochman clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. As a prosecutor, Hochman brought justice to drug lords, corrupt government officials, tax evaders, and violent gang members. In 2008, Hochman was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. Nathan has served his community on numerous charitable boards and as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission.

Hochman launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For updates on this campaign, visit [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=bbe3e4547b&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=351d55ff8d&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=98f824a6cd&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=345ca99cdf&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5535576943&e=94837ebab3). ###
